string_table:
#include "text\rus\string_table_tasks_standart.xml" Find two "Jellyfish" artifacts Need to find two "Jellyfish" artifacts for Sidorovich within two days. Must be in good condition. A guy from the Mainland ordered a couple of "Jellyfish" from me. It's an easy job and the money isn't huge, but it's reliable, and you'll be back in no time. Granted, there's a small catch - the artifacts must be in good condition. Let's see... what's today's date? Aha... You need to get the job done in two days. So, just agree to it! Don't worry about the reward. If you manage to bring them first, you can get: If anyone else is still looking for a couple of "Jellyfish" for me, you're too late. Stand down! If anyone else is still looking for a couple of "Jellyfish" for me, that's it, they've been brought in. Stand down!
Obtain a "Stone Flower" artifact Need to find a "Stone Flower" artifact in good condition for Sidorovich within two days. One of my regular clients needs a "Stone Flower". For some jewelry purposes, he says. We wouldn't want to upset the lovely ladies waiting for their trinkets, right? If you put your back into it and bring me this art in good condition within two days, you'll get a worthy reward: The "Stone Flower" is no longer needed. The client canceled the order. The "Stone Flower" is no longer needed. A quick lad already found it.
Collect three "Blood of the Stone" artifacts Need to find three "Blood of the Stone" artifacts for Sidorovich within three days. Must be in good condition. I have an interesting task. The order is from a military department. Or rather, the scientific branch of this department. They are developing new medical treatments. And they need, it seems, "Blood of the Stone" artifacts - three whole pieces. All of them must be in good condition. You have three days for the search. Will you take it? I guarantee you will receive a worthy payment for your efforts: To all concerned: the "Blood of the Stone" arts have been sent to the client. Thanks everyone, you are all dismissed. To all concerned: the ordered "Blood of the Stone" arts have been brought to me. Thanks everyone, you are all dismissed.
Obtain a "Meat Chunk" artifact Need to find a "Meat Chunk" artifact in good condition for Sidorovich within two days. I've got an order from a private clinic. They use innovative treatment methods based on the properties of certain artifacts. They urgently need a "Meat Chunk" in good condition for a particularly severe patient. The package must be sent out no later than in two days. So, are you willing to help a person out? You can get something worthwhile as a reward: The "Meat Chunk" for the latest order has been received. If anyone is still looking - don't bother. Thanks to everyone who responded. The "Meat Chunk" for the latest order was delivered by Marked One. Thanks to everyone who responded.
Collect three "Sparkler" artifacts Need to find three "Sparkler" artifacts for Sidorovich within three days. Must be in good condition. A representative of a pharmaceutical company that specializes in performance-enhancing drugs for athletes contacted me. I don't know exactly what they are plotting over there, but for testing their new developments they need three "Sparklers" in good condition. I entrusted this job to some blockhead, but I haven't heard a peep out of him, and time is ticking. Three days left until the end of the agreed delivery period. Will you help me out? If you agree, here is the reward from me: Stalkers, one of the rookies got lucky. He brought all three "Sparklers" from the recent order. Everyone else - stand down. Stalkers, Marked One completed the order for the three "Sparklers". Everyone else - stand down.
Find three "Wrenched" artifacts Need to find three "Wrenched" artifacts for Sidorovich within three days. Must be in good condition. An outfit making hunting gear sent an order. They want to get three "Wrenched" artifacts, strictly in good condition, and the order absolutely must be shipped to them no later than in three days. Are you in? The following reward is provided for the executor: People, whoever was looking for "Wrenched" artifacts for me, you can stop bothering. You're taking too long. People, whoever was looking for "Wrenched" artifacts for me, you can stop bothering. Marked One dragged in the full set.
Bring bloodsucker tentacles A bloodsucker tentacle brings luck? Let's see if the bloodsuckers get lucky... Need to whack them and cut out a couple of their tentacles. Sidorovich said to bring them no later than in three days. Have you heard the superstition that a bloodsucker tentacle attracts luck? Rumor has it that if you wear one around your neck, anomalies let you go and artifacts jump right into your hands. I think it's all bullshit, but there are idiots who believe it and are ready to pay good money.\nA guy just ordered such tentacles from me, and next week I have to provide him with a couple of these scraps. That means you need to bring me two appendages no later than in three days. Anyway, if you scrounge up the ghoul's tentacles faster than anyone else - I won't forget it, you'll get to choose from: People, if anyone is still bothering to search for two bloodsucker tentacles for me: that's it, they are no longer needed! People, if anyone is still bothering to search for two bloodsucker tentacles for me: that's it, they are no longer needed!
Obtain pseudodog tails Obtain five pseudodog tails for Sidorovich. Time limit is three days, but it's better to manage it in two. Winter is coming. And what do the broads back on the Mainland like to wear in winter? That's right! They love to wear furs. So a new trend started - making all sorts of accessories out of pseudodog tails. The fur there is kind of special! Anyway, I've got an order for such tails. Will you take it?\nI figure to collect all the orders by the end of the week, to prepare them for shipping. So figure it out - you have no more than three days. And don't doubt the payment... You know how it is, women don't skimp on spending cash on themselves! You'll get this if you manage to gather five tails first: To everyone who signed up to get five pseudodog tails! I've already collected the agreed amount. I don't need any more for now. To everyone who signed up to get five pseudodog tails! I've already collected the agreed amount. I don't need any more for now.
Obtain a pseudogiant part Obtain a pseudogiant part. Sidorovich gave a five-day deadline. I got an order to procure pseudogiant tissue samples, for some very important research. What exactly to cut off this behemoth doesn't matter, the client will accept any part. The deadlines are tight, you need to get it done in five days. Will you take on this stinking job? They promised a worthy payment, the deposit is already transferred, so from my end, whoever completes this task first will get: Bad news for those who were trying to take down the giant. The eggheads managed it themselves before you! Shame on you, stalkers, getting beat by lab rats, ptui. Anyway - thanks everyone, you're all dismissed! Bad news for those who were trying to take down the Giant. I already have the part! Someone already got their reward...
Obtain two burer hands Obtain two burer hands in three days. Sidorovich will pawn them off to foreigners. I saw a couple of burers somewhere recently... A certain middleman, a foreigner, asked me to get some burer parts for him. He pays well for them, but he won't go after a burer himself, hell, he won't even set foot in the Zone... And he won't say why he needs this contagion!\nAnd one more thing: you need to do this by... uh... well, basically, you have a three-day deadline. No more. If you meet the deadline before the others, you'll get something worthwhile from me: The burer hands have been brought to me! I don't need any more for now! The burer hands have been brought to me! I don't need any more for now! A quick lad, even if he did fall off a truck...
A crate of food for Barkeep from Cordon Need to deliver supplies to the Bar and hand them over to Barkeep. Deadline is one day. Barkeep informed me that he's running out of some grub, and by the time the shipment arrives, the hungry stalkers will eat him alive... Anyway, he's asking for some food to be brought up quickly. I already sent some with local runners, but there's still canned food left... Will you deliver it? You seem to have recovered, can you lug it? Payment is on the spot, maybe he'll toss you an artifact or some cash...\nIf you agree, don't drag your feet, I don't want to take the blame - you need to get it done in a day.
A gift from Sidorovich for Mikhalych Need to deliver a gift to Mikhalych in Limansk - a keg of wine. His birthday is in three days. I want to send some good vintage wine to my brother-in-law, his birthday is coming up. Will you deliver it? I don't remember exactly when... in three days, maybe... or later.\nJust in case, get it done in three days, because, you know - timing is everything. So gear up, don't drag your feet.
Payment from Sidorovich to Baldy Need to deliver money in a case to Baldy at the Bar. Sidorovich asked to get it done in a day. Baldy brought me some artifacts a while ago - it was a good batch, I didn't even have enough cash on hand right then, but I have to pay up... Will you deliver the cash to him, the rest of it? You seem like an honest guy...\nOnly here's the thing - he's really rushing it. You need to make it by tomorrow, otherwise, he says, he won't be able to invest the money into a certain venture. So you better hurry.
Parts from Sidorovich for Screw Need to deliver some spare parts and tools to Screw at the Army Warehouses. Screw can wait a couple of days. Screw, the Freedom "handyman", fixes all sorts of junk... when he's sober, yeah... Anyway, Shinkar asked to pass on some tools. Will you deliver them? He asked for it urgently, but that's business as usual.\nI think he can endure a couple of days. Plan your time accordingly.
Vodka from Sidorovich for Jaeger Need to deliver twenty bottles of vodka to Jaeger in the Red Forest within three days. A local beast-slayer has dug in at the Red Forest - Jaeger is his nickname, haven't you heard? Well, he quickly and accurately completes the most difficult tasks to procure all kinds of pelts and such... I want to make him happy - deliver a crate of vodka to him. Will you take it? Just don't drag it out, three days maximum. I'll soon have an order for a large batch, and I want to butter him up before that.\nWell? What? Do you agree?
Wipe out a dog pack at the Cordon within 24 hours Wipe out the dogs at the Cordon that are interfering with the trader's couriers coming from the Garbage. The trader will be pleased. Lately, dogs have multiplied like dirt - they're preventing people from passing, couriers are complaining, shipments are delayed. So, here's the deal: get going past the bridge - I was informed that these barking scum have settled there. You'll figure it out on the spot - everyone will thank you, and I won't hold back on a worthy reward. Agreed?\nAnd keep in mind, if I say "get going", it means the job has to be done fast, in 24 hours max.\nThe reward is worthy, for example, something like this:
Wipe out the dogs near the old locomotive Wipe out the dogs at the Cordon that are interfering with the trader's couriers coming from the Sanatorium. The trader gave one day. Lately, dogs have multiplied like dirt - they're preventing people from passing, couriers are complaining. Trade is suffering losses. Already guessed what this talk is about? Then... grab your legs and move out. As soon as you deliver our collective warm regards to the dogs, come back - I'll reward you. Deal?\nBut don't go thinking anyone is going to wait a month, and the job is a piece of cake. Basically, this issue needs to be resolved today, or else I'll ask someone else... or maybe I'll go myself - relive my youth. Heh-heh...\nDo it quickly - you'll get a reward:
Wipe out the pseudodogs at the Cordon Recently these things showed up here at the Cordon - pseudodogs. Don't think they were here before. People are afraid to walk that road. It's better to stay on good terms with the trader. A day's deadline. There's way too much wildlife at the Cordon lately. And now these pseudodogs have moved in. Our rookies refuse to even walk in that direction, the boys lack experience. Be a pal, solve this problem - I'll owe you one.\nManage it - you'll get these trinkets from me:
Clear the area of mutants Clear the area of mutants. Given a day for this job. There's a job, not too hard. They want to bring a foreign tourist to me in a few days. I can't refuse. He's ready to toss in some good cash just to look at the Zone - meaning the client isn't poor and, let's just say, is promising. Therefore, it'd be a pity if the rodents gnaw him to death or the boars trample him. Basically, wherever they'll be guiding him, the area needs to be cleared of mutants. Will you take it?\nOnly you need to get it done in a day, because he's going to drag his ass here soon. Afterwards it won't be needed anymore.\nIf everything goes well - you'll get this piece of swag:
Wipe out the boars at the Cordon A sounder of boars lives near the railway bridge. Sidorovich really dislikes their presence there. It must be something personal. Needs to be resolved in a day. Recently, near the railway bridge, my courier was torn apart by boars. Why did the Zone even spawn such creatures. Because of them, we're losing our best people, and the merchandise, obviously. Make it so I can be sure that the next runner will pass that road without any special problems. I'm giving you a one-day deadline.\nIf the place is clean, this present will fall your way from me:
Kill the bloodsucker in the Dark Valley Some unusual bloodsucker showed up in the Dark Valley. Need to find it and... secure safe access to the body. Eggheads will be visiting in a couple of days. They say the military left the Dark Valley, and after that, mutants of all stripes started pouring out of every crack. Stalkers already saw a bloodsucker there. And an unusual one, too... huge, apparently - almost three meters tall. But they're probably lying - fear has big eyes. On the other hand - who knows... basically, when the rumor reaches the eggheads - they will definitely want to study this specimen. And I want to be the man who sells the corpse to the eggheads. Your task is to kill the beast, and I'll take care of the rest.\nMaking the eggheads wait is wrong, of course, but they can wait a couple of days, they won't sour. Count on that, and remember that you aren't the only one signed up for this job. I can personally offer this for successfully completing this deal:
Talk to the hunter Talk to one of the hunters and try to clarify the situation - what goods, how, and through what channels they are leaving the Zone. Sidorovich asked to clear the situation up in three days. You know about the hunters, right? The ones who set up a supply base for themselves in the "Gut"...\nTo me, generally, their hunting business is whatever - let them salt all kinds of guts, that's not the point. The point is that they somehow pawn off all this offal through some channels of their own. And I have a strong suspicion - are artifacts also leaving through these same channels? I don't really like how our main buyer has been acting lately... Seems we'll have to look for another, more generous one...\nI'm asking you - talk to one of the hunters, their bosses won't say anything, that's obvious, but maybe a simple beast-slayer has something to make old Sidorovich happy. The task with the beast-catchers is canceled. Whoever was trying to make contact with the beast-slayers - it's not needed for now.
Well look who showed up. Who are you? Marked One. Hello to you too. Can I distract you for a couple of words? I'm thinking, maybe I should join up with you. Well... No problem, basically. Let's shoot the breeze, and rest at the same time. You hunters seem to have set yourselves up pretty well, from what I see. Does the profit justify such a life? How should I put it. It's definitely better than breaking your back in a mine for pennies. And the risk is almost the same. I don't think you'll regret it, friend Marked One, if you join us. If you have a strong character. In our line of work, the best thing is not to rush, not to fuss, then you'll have profit and your skin will be intact. Is that so? Hmm. And who buys all this offal? Is it just one person or what? Why I'm asking is, what if the buyer-supplier thread snaps and we're left holding the bag after all the fun... You're a calculating one, I see. Let's do this, I'll put your mind at ease, and you help me out. I want to go after some fleshes, but those infections have hides of steel, you can't take them down with just any ammo. So, purely out of the goodness of your heart, toss me fifty rounds of buckshot, and I, also out of the broadness of my heart, will outline what's what for your peace of mind. Deal? I don't really care, honestly. Maybe I'll make up my mind later. I have some. Here. So what's going on with you guys? Think about it, it's not forbidden. There! Good. Now I'll show these pigs... Well, regarding what you're interested in, I'll say this: our Ignat is tightly tied to a very big man. He manages massive funds, owns several factories worldwide, and produces medicine too. He also conducts research. He wants to make even more dough with new drugs. Buy himself a presidency somewhere. So, this road is very well-trodden. It won't break - you can be sure of that. He doesn't mess with arts, because you can end up behind bars for that. But nobody pays attention to tails and hooves. Understood. Well, everything seems clear for now. I'll be going. Hello, Marked One. Well? Do you want to become a hunter? I'm having some doubts. What if suddenly nobody needs these hooves and tails? You said you could dispel my doubts? Don't worry so much! Better pour out fifty rounds of buckshot, and we'll talk about life. And you won't be worrying. Hello, friend. How's life?
Met with him, discussed their business. Right, and? Says they don't deal with artifacts, because their channel doesn't want to be exposed in illegal activities. And nobody cares about mutant offal... Hmm... Maybe I should get into that too... I'm a bit tired - getting old, apparently. Well? What do you need? I helped you, right? Now it's your turn...
Investigate Duty's supply channel Find the mentioned Duty member and politely but firmly press him about the "ghost caravans" supplying Duty. Need to manage to pull this off in three days. Lately, facts have been emerging that the main needs of Duty are replenished through some secret supply channel. None of the stalkers know, or aren't sharing their knowledge about who, how, and with what supplies Duty. As far as I can judge, even Barkeep isn't in the loop! Such a situation can backfire on us traders, who are bound by a mutual agreement regarding the currency used and the list of essential goods.\nIt's desirable to clarify this matter as soon as possible. I know a guy from Duty who can be carefully pressed regarding these "ghost supply caravans". If a certain stalker, not affiliated with anyone, could manage to pull this off, then... My gratitude won't leave him wanting. Well? Will you be that stalker? Will you take it upon yourself to talk to our "inside man"? Regarding the "ghost caravans" deliveries. You can stop stressing over it. The issue with the "ghost caravans" has been cleared up... No need to look anymore.
Well hello! Want to sign up with us? Welcome! Good gear, weapons, plenty of grub... Put 'er there, brother! What's your name? I'm Marked One. You describe it beautifully. But where do all these blessings come from? Doesn't look like there are any co-ops around here. Marked One? I've heard something about you... You did something there, showed how tough you are? Yeah? We need fighters like that... And don't worry about our gear, it's not local homemade stuff! All from factories. With a quality mark! Hmm... Hard to believe. And how does all this get here from the factories? How does it get here? Hmm. That's secret business. And not subject to disclosure! Although...\nI can see - you're not some Freedom member, let them get the runs every time they... Well, you get it... More details on the "although", if possible. Someone here was saying that a certain "Marked One" took it upon himself to heal our warrant officer's back? Wasn't that you by any chance? Supposedly, an infusion from the eyes of those very same pigs helps greatly? You, right?\nI immediately realized you aren't asking questions just for the hell of it! Let's make a deal then: you also help me with this matter - bring me three gouged-out eyes, no more needed, and we'll have a heart-to-heart talk about the topics you're interested in. Well? Well... I don't have any on me. But the offer is interesting. You try your best, okay? Because it's unbearable, the damn thing hurts! Hmm... As if I knew, I brought some with me. Here, almost fresh. Look at that! Nice job! Here's the deal. Just don't go blabbing to everyone! Our bosses have ties in the structures of a certain big country. And so... You understand? Like they are transporting all sorts of scientific instruments to some eggheads in the Swamps, and the crates have clever markings on them... Well, our guys meet these crates there, store them, and, as necessary - deliver them where they need to go. Got it? Here, take this suit, the manufacturer's markings are still on it, I took it straight from the crate. We erase these markings later. Just remember - I didn't tell you anything, and you didn't ask anything! Hmm... Through the Swamps, you say... Well, take care, sick man. Well, how is it, Marked One? Did you bring them? Remind me, what did you want? I'm waiting, suffering from pain, and it turns out he didn't even think about it! I asked for flesh eyes, three of them, to mix up an infusion! Hello, friend! How are you doing? Alright? Good.
I met with a Duty member. Had a heart-to-heart talk. And? Don't drag it out... Where do they get their ammo? Did you find out? He let slip that they pull it from factories under the cover of scientific shipments to the Swamps. Here, a suit with the manufacturer's marks still intact. Alright... So that's where Duty's abundance comes from.\nAnd what's the use... Although... It's clear anyway...\nWhy are you standing there like a statue? You owe me for expenses and other rewards! Didn't forget, did you?
Freedom's supplies Find a talkative Freedom member within three days and find out where and by what route all the artifacts obtained by Freedom are going. Lately, it has become very difficult to fence artifacts through our established channels. There is information that huge volumes from an unknown source are appearing from our sector of the Zone!\nThis, firstly, hits all lone stalkers, because if this situation continues, we'll have to lower the prices for artifacts, and secondly, it's fraught with arousing the interest of government structures, which could lead to our channels being shut down entirely...\nIf you are interested in getting a certain amount of reward for clarifying these issues, then I would ask you to meet with one of the Freedom members.\nAs I've learned, he was Lukash's personal bodyguard for a long time and might know something about how and where those artifacts that fall into the hands of this faction's leaders "disappear" to. About the "left-wing" channels for offloading our materials. Stand down for now. New facts have emerged regarding involvement in the "left-wing" channels for exporting artifacts. So you can relax for now.
Yo, broski! How's it hangin'? Let's shake on it! What's your street name? They call me Marked One. What's going on around here with you guys? What's goin' on with us? We're havin' a blast! Scored some weed recently. So now it's super fun... You don't wanna join us fo' real? Uh... Not really feeling it. And where do you get the dough for all this weed and other stuff? Through Sidorovich? The hell you talkin' about, bro! What Sidorovich! That cheapskate is sittin' far away and ain't in the loop at a-a-all! We're pullin' off such deals here, it'll blow your mind! And Duty with their rules can go choke on barley... Strange, I thought Sidorovich was the main channel. I thought all the artifacts go to the mainland through him... Maybe you'll tell me? I might figure out where to drag my own swag... Listen here, if you got some good swag, then share. And I, like to a true homie, will lay it all out for you straight! Come on, share a decent art, not some bullshit... Do I really need this? I was just saying. Anyway, I'll think about it in my spare time. Well, you figure it out faster, while I drop by my buddy Bogdan, he owes me a couple bottles of booze. Not bullshit? Well I have one, here. So what now? Oh! Now you're a real man! And I was just thinkin' - where to find some more for a joint! Oh! You wanted to know how to fence arts decently, right?\nYou know our stingy cheapskate? The one who fences all sorts of junk. Well, his own brother is a bi-i-ig boss in the agencies in Kyiv, figure that! And he's got an outlet overseas. So the cheapskate set up the transfer. Specialists fly in here to him about twice a month, well not exactly here, they don't really wanna be seen. And so - they haul out the best merchandise.\nI even got a photo, here, look - this is me, this, so to speak, is our cheapskate, and this - is that very same big shot from the agencies... Take it as a keepsake, I got mo... Hmm... I don't think I'll risk giving my hard-earned cash to such an arrogant mug. You could crack a pig's skull on his forehead... Ah, bro, you again. How's your swag? Ain't lost it yet? Are you still in need of a good art? You bet! N-n-naturally! Joints - they ain't just layin' on the road... Bro-o-oski! You! Well! Wanna smoke? What? No? A'ight then...
I talked to a blabbermouth from Freedom... And? What's the deal with those blockheads? He says that through their Shinkar, through his relative, they send off their artifacts. Here, he gave me a photo where the loading is taking place. Ah! Well I know about this channel, I thought maybe they found a new one. Strange. The mysteries multiply. Alright. What were we doing again? Well I spent some money and generally - running back and forth... I'd like to get some swag to live on...
Investigate the new trader Find the new "trader" and, within three days, find out: how much of a competitor he can be to Sidorovich. Not long ago, rumors reached me about a new "trader". Supposedly a stalker, sells supplies cheaply, and buys arts for more than old Sidorovich... Hmm... I'm not afraid of competition, of course, everything is honest with me. You want to start your own little "business" - nobody's against it! Look at Lyokha in the Sanatorium or, say, Cook at the Garbage - fencing stuff peacefully and no problems. But... I'd like to know more about this "trader": where he gets his goods, how he plans to sell the arts, and so on. If you would take it upon yourself to calm me down and clarify the questions that interest me, then I'd find a way to thank you. Well? Will you find this "trader"? Regarding the issue with the new "trader". You can stop stressing over it for now. The issue with the new "trader" has been cleared up... No need to investigate anymore.
Stalker, looking for something? Want to buy or sell something? Oh... I never would have guessed I'd meet a new Sidorovich out in the open field? What do you have? Well... I'm no Sidorovich, of course, but I have a few things: canned food, then again ammo, a bit of useful medicine. Got any artifacts? Maybe I do... And, excuse my persistence, but where's the stuff from? Because they say some hustler is selling cheap ammo, but that ammo only works as blanks... That's why I'm wondering. Nah, don't doubt it! Even though my supply isn't from overseas, it's all reliable! I tested it myself, and the guys did too. Not from overseas? Then where from? And, I wouldn't want to get poisoned by your medicine... Is there any quality stamp or something? Hmm, you ask strange questions. Let's do this, here, take some canned food from me. A simple artifact for five cans. The stamp hasn't even rubbed off them yet! And I will tell you where I get them. Deal? Hmm... I'm somewhat doubtful. I'll think about it. Don't doubt it! I'm telling you honestly! Everything is of excellent quality! Hmm... Well let's see. Here's an art. Spill it. Right, here you go. Eat to your health! You see the production date here, perfectly fresh, not like Sidorovich's... This, brother, is a direct shipment from the Mainland. Have you heard that the Duty members have been having problems with grub lately? Well there you go. Their caravan disappeared in the Swamps. Well, rather, they think it disappeared, but I know what happened there. How could anyone push through such a route? They ran into a pack of pseudodogs, and those dogs took everyone down. Everything that was edible - they ate, of course. But the canned food, ammo, and some medicine remained completely intact in the crates. Well, I quietly gathered it all up and here, now I don't even need to risk it - I'm quietly trading. Alright, take care. I'm heading somewhere. Well take care, dealer... Huh? Is that you? Well, are you going to buy anything? You said your canned food still had the manufacturer's stamps? Will you show me? If you're so interested - then buy some! Just one little artifact for five cans. Hello! What? Wanted to buy something? Sorry, I need to go to the stash, I don't have anything right now.
I met with him, talked to him. So? And? How big are his plans? Who is the supplier? Who in the cordon is he operating through? Don't fuss. The kid just found an abandoned stash. So he's slowly selling it off. Says a Duty caravan was torn apart by mutants. Here's a can - see the manufacturer? Clear where the Duty members pull their gear from? Ah! And I thought... Well, alright. I think I'll put these cans away for a while. Show them to someone later. In exchange, I'll give you some of my good ones. Why the sour face? From you, and suddenly - good ones? Alright, you better pour out something better for my efforts.
Find out about the bandit stash Find one of the bandit "bosses" and, within three days, clarify the rumors about the missing stash. Deadline is three days. For a while now, there's been a persistent rumor that someone "liberated" the bandit stash in the Dark Valley. Whether it's true or not, and who is involved, everyone would like to find out. Including me. There must be huge sums in that stash.\nThere's a guy there who used to leak some info to me from time to time.\nMaybe you could try to find him and get him talkin' to confirm this rumor? That's it for the stash for now. You can stop stressing over it. No need to look for the "stash" anymore. Seems everything is clear...
What're ya lookin' for here? Look at ya, shootin' your eyes around! A spy? Yeah. I'm a spy. Lookin' at how to tell everyone how you dumped piles of crap here. Ain't ya disgusted yourselves? Planted "mines" all around... What're ya? A sanitation worker? We dump wherever we want! Cause we ain't taking orders from any... Got it! If we want to, we'll herd all sorts of eggheads here and they'll lick it clean. We got so much dough, chickens won't peck it... Wouldn't peck it... Oh yeah? I heard somethin' else. Rumor's goin' around that your Borov got played like a sucker. And someone snatched all his, and your, cash. A rumor? Well yeah, those infections are blabberin'. Like there ain't enough blabberin' in the Zone... Listenin' to everyone means disrespectin' yourself. Although... Well, well, spit it out... Don't you 'well' me! You ain't the boss! See - I'm super hoarse, and a-a-all that! You should put out some decent grub, and then talk the talk. You wanna know what happened to our swag? Hand over ten cans of stew then! And the same amount of bread. Me and the boys have been consumin' all sorts of garbage instead of grub for three days now... What kind of punks are you, that you don't even have any grub... Alright, I have that setup. Here. Don't push it! We got stuff you've never even seen! Just wanna have a simple snack by the campfire, like in the old days... Oh! You're a real homie! Respect! So about the swag...\nBasically - Borov is a big boss, not some sucker... He knows that stalkers dream of snatchin' our blood-earned stash. Heard about that hustler Bes? Keeps stretching his claws, oughta kill that snake! And so... We started singing left and right that the stash is gone, that stalkers stole it. But it ain't gone nowhere! It's all hidden in a safe place. And nobody knows where! Only the Boss himself! And a couple more close bosses. And they don't dig into the stash unnecessarily, so as not to expose it. That's how it is! Understood. Although it's weird. Alright, take care, "bosses". Ah! The spy! Still interested in everything? Yeah, got some doubts. You said to toss you some grub? Five sausages? Don't you try to bluff me! Who the hell needs your stinking sausage! You give me ten cans of stew! And bread, ten loaves. Then we'll have a close talk. Ah, you again. What else do you want?
Well I don't know. I talked to this "boss". Only... What "only"? Speak more clearly - who took the stash, where is it now, who's looking for it? That thug of yours is only good for eating. Seemed to me like he doesn't know squat. Says Borov hid the stash because stalkers started creeping around. I kinda don't believe it. Believe it, don't believe it. We're not playing roulette... I asked you to find out everything thoroughly, and you just shot the breeze and didn't find out anything. You work poorly! Poorly?! I did everything like you said! Met with who I needed to, talked. Well, anyway - pay up!
Find out about Monolith members from the mercenaries Find a specific mercenary and find out what their group knows about contacts with Monolith members. Deadline is five days, otherwise the mercenary will leave. Have you heard about the Monolith members? Stalkers say all sorts of things about them, but... One thing is clear for now: first, they exist, second: they are people, well, and third: they usually dwell somewhere near the station... Understand? No?\nHere's the deal: if they are people, it means they need certain things. If they are near the station, they have countless rare artifacts! All that's left is to make contact with them and do a little exchange.\nThe catch is that contact hasn't been established yet, but... But there is information that there is a small group of mercenaries who have contacted Monolith members! So we need to find out - what and how. Will you take it upon yourself to have a chat with one of the mercenaries? We can forget about contacts with Monolith members for now. Monolith members will now contact specific people. The rest can stop worrying.
What do you want? Why are you here? Hello. They call me Marked One. Decided to look around here. Say hello. Maybe a drop or two for medicinal purposes - to our acquaintance? A drop or two? What is that? Ah, we were told about this. You are offering to drink vodka? We do not consume. The head must be clear. That is the main commandment of a professional... Marked One. So you're professionals, then? A question for such great specialists, then - do you go further than the Brain Scorcher? Or do you waste all your professional zeal here, in this nook - roasting piggies' legs? Uh... What are you saying? I do not understand everything. Brain Scorcher? That is sector 24 to the north? We work there. There are results. What kind - we do not say. Understood. And these Monolith members, have you seen them? What are they? Monolith members? There are such, yes. A group of people who speak poorly. We think they are slightly telepathic. Not entirely sure. There is contact. Want to know more? Then help. Bring power batteries for the flashlight. The last batch fell into the swamp. They do not work. Now we rarely turn on the illumination device. Because of that. Bring batteries - ten. Then we will talk better. I will think about it. Might bring them. Yes. That is good. Bring them. We will talk. Yes, I have that many with me. Take them. Speak, what's there? Yes. These are the ones needed. Thank you. About "Monolith", I am speaking. We have facts that these are people who can transmute energy. It is possible that they can create any object. There is a video recording where one of the Monolith members made bread out of thin air. It is a miracle. Impossible to understand. He said - everyone can do this. Only need to think. Here is a copy of the video. You can see for yourself. Hmm. Are miracles really possible? I'll take a look... You. Marked One. Wanted to bring batteries? Yes. Was going to. Remind me, how many did you want? How many did I want? Batteries, quantity? Yes. Ten batteries. Needed. Yes? You. Marked One, yes? Wanted what?
I talked to the "professional" about their contacts with Monolith members... And what are the results? Will there be an opportunity for trade relations? Who can act as a middleman? He gave me a video tape showing one of the Monolith members making a loaf of bread right out of thin air. It seems to me that with such abilities, they don't need your "goods" even for free! You just don't understand some things. I'll watch the film, of course, it's interesting. But... I stand by my opinion - if someone exists, it means they need something. All that's left is to figure out this need. That's how it is. Alright, thank you. Thanks won't buy me a drink. Let's talk about our mutual settlements instead.
Find a rare pistol Obtain an OTs-33 "Pernach" pistol. They say the commander of the military post under the ruined bridge at the Cordon flaunted one. But maybe there's an option to get one through other military members. Deadline is three days. Sigh, what a stupid trend for fancy weapons has started, nobody wants to shoot regular ones anymore, not even the rookies! Anyway, there's an order for a rare piece. Rumor has it that the military commander who extorts money for passing under the bridge here has an OTs-33 "Pernach". Can you get one?\nThe jarhead does get relieved from time to time, though. I don't know exactly when he's on duty and when he's resting. If you can't catch him, but have other ties among the military, ask around. The client is impatient, so you need to manage it in three days.\nIf everything comes together, I'll reward you like this: The "Pernach" is no longer needed. The client kicked the bucket. People, the "Pernach" has already been obtained. Everyone else can stop worrying.
Obtain a sniper rifle Obtain an SVU sniper rifle. It might be possible to buy it from Duty's supply officer - Petrenko. Need to get it done in three days. A guy dropped by recently, looking for a compact sniper rifle, like an SVU. A specialist, apparently. Loaded with cash and all that. So, will you agree to find one for me?\nFrom what I've heard, Duty's supply officer - Petrenko, has them. Only there's not much time, I'm afraid the client will find out what's what himself, and the dough will float away.\nIf you wrap this up in three days, I'll owe you one. The SVU sniper rifle is no longer needed - the client left. People, the SVU has already been obtained. Everyone else can stop worrying.
Obtain scientific suits Obtain two scientific suits in four days. Regular ones. Might try getting them from the eggheads at Yantar. A group of "young naturalists" from Europe showed up recently... All in fancy suits, the latest fashion... So stu-u-upid! Didn't even make it a hundred meters before stepping into "Fruit Punch". And that was it. Their trendy outfits are ruined. Now they're moaning that they're ready to pay big bucks for normal suits and a guide. Well, I'll find them a guide, but as for the suits...\nCan you dash to Yantar in three or four days? Our eggheads sell their suits there - buy a couple.\nAnd I'll settle up with you in full here. To everyone looking for scientific suits - that's it, they are no longer required. People, the scientific suits have already been obtained. Marked One here, fast as diarrhea, helped out.
Obtain a Saiga carbine Need to obtain a Saiga carbine. They seem to offer them at the eggheads' camp in the Swamps. Three days, maximum. A stalker dropped by my place recently. An experienced lad, knows what's what in the Zone. Wanted to buy a Saiga carbine from me, but... As luck would have it - I don't have one right now.\nWould you agree to dash to the Swamps? The eggheads have a camp there, and they might trade such a gun for mutant offal... Only let's do it like this - if you take it, be quick. The guy won't wait long.\nThree days, maximum.\nAnd I won't hold out on you. Whoever was looking for a Saiga for me, that's it, not needed anymore. Everything is sorted. People, the Saiga has already been obtained, I don't need any more for now.
Collect three "Slime" artifacts Need to find three "Slime" artifacts for Barkeep within five days. Must be in good condition. I'm thinking about updating the menu. Decided to establish contact with the hunters from the "Gut" to start buying sausage from them. So these bastards immediately hit me with a steep price - three "Slimes". And that's just for a trial batch. Plus they want the artifacts to be in good condition, unworn. And five days to "think about it". Saying they have no shortage of clients even without me. Have you ever seen such arrogant jerks? But there isn't much to choose from here. I'll have to agree. Ready to work for the benefit of my patrons' stomachs? I won't shortchange you on the reward, you can get: Whoever I gave the task of getting "Slimes", you can relax - I already have them. The early bird gets the worm. Whoever I gave the task of getting "Slimes", you can relax - I already have them. Learn from Marked One how to work fast.
Find two "Crystal Thorn" artifacts Need to find two "Crystal Thorn" artifacts for Barkeep within three days. Must be in good condition. So, look: I got an order for a couple of "Crystal Thorn" artifacts in good condition. Seems they want to use them for training CBRN defense specialists. I gave this task to a few stalkers, but no one has delighted me with good news yet. Meanwhile, time is running out. According to the contract with the client, there are only three days left to send the package. Any desire to participate in this enterprise? I promise a decent reward: People, the "Crystal Thorns" have already been brought to me. Please do not bother me about this. People, the "Crystal Thorns" were just delivered to me. You snooze, you lose.
Find two "Night Star" artifacts Need to find two "Night Star" artifacts for Barkeep within five days. Must be in good condition. I need "Night Star" artifacts. Just a couple of pieces, but absolutely in good condition. This order came from a European research institute, in case you're interested in knowing. They are asking to hurry up and send the order no later than in five days. I try to fulfill my clients' wishes, especially since they pay a solid sum. If the conditions suit you, you'll get this out of it: To everyone who took on getting a couple of "Night Stars" for me: a skilled stalker was found, already brought them. Thanks to the rest of you for participating. To everyone who took on getting a couple of "Night Stars" for me: the artifacts were delivered by Marked One. Thanks to the rest of you for participating.
Collect three "Flash" artifacts Need to find three "Flash" artifacts for Barkeep within five days. Must be in good condition. There is a job, but I'm warning you right away: it needs to be completed in five days maximum. So, I need three "Flash" artifacts in good condition, not expired. Yes, exactly, for me personally. Don't expect any other explanations. But you have the right to know the reward in advance, of course: Informing everyone looking for "Flashes" for me: there is no longer a need for them. One quick lad beat everyone to it, brought the required amount. Informing everyone looking for "Flashes" for me: there is no longer a need for them. Marked One hustled and brought the required amount.
Obtain an "Empty" artifact Need to find an "Empty" artifact in good condition for Barkeep within five days. Marked One, a foreign collector ordered an "Empty" artifact from me. I know you can't find such an artifact in the south of the Zone, and therefore I'm meeting those who want to earn halfway: I'm giving a five-day deadline. If you aren't sure you'll make it in time, I'd better entrust it to others. There is one more condition - the artifact must not be expired, meaning in good condition. If we shake on it, this reward will be waiting for you: No one ever brought me the "Empty" in five days. The task is canceled. I'll entrust this job to real professionals. Marked One found the "Empty" for me for the recent order. The rest of you can relax.
Obtain two poltergeist eyes Obtain two poltergeist eyes. Why did I agree to this? I'll have to crawl into that damn lab again. Or... where else have I seen these creatures? I hope I'll find them in three days. I heard that in the laboratory, the one in the Dark Valley, there are these... poltergeists. I have a brainy acquaintance from the scientific brotherhood. So, I want to give him a gift. He's been interested for a long time in the possibility of studying telekine... whatever they're called... The monsters' abilities, basically. In short, try to get these damn poltergeist eyes, he needs a pair for the purity of the experiment. Rumor has it, all their paranormal power is contained in them. So let him dissect and study them there. We get the profit, and he might get some prize for a scientific discovery. I'm sending the package this week. So, you have two, maximum three days. Unless, of course, someone gets them for me before that time. Afterwards, they won't be needed.\nIf you make me happy, I'll make you happy: This is Barkeep speaking. Poltergeist eyes are no longer needed. Some reckless guy already dragged them in. This is Barkeep speaking. A quick lad already dragged the poltergeist eyes in for me, they are no longer needed.
Bring bloodsucker tentacles Barkeep asked to bring two bloodsucker jaws. They're having a celebration, gonna be gourmets. The things they eat. Need to manage it in three days. We have a celebration coming up soon, and there will be a festive dinner, and some local gourmets in a particularly high mood (we won't point fingers) will definitely want to try my signature dish - bloodsucker tentacles in pork sauce. I mean, in their own juice under mayonnaise. Basically, the jaws of this creature are needed - just a couple of pieces... but quickly. I made a deal with the hunters, but they are keeping quiet for now. So don't drag your feet. Do it in a couple of days so they have time to marinate for the table.\nFrom me you can receive: Bloodsucker flesh has been delivered, no more is needed. One... swift guy helped out. Bloodsucker flesh has been delivered, no more is needed! One... swift guy already dragged it in.
Bring snork body parts Getting snork fragments in these parts is a problem, plus three pieces are needed. Where did I see these creatures? Three days for the search. Did I tell you about my egghead acquaintance from the Mainland? Well anyway, later... He was telling me recently, seems he got really into this... genetics stuff. He needs snork parts in the lab for this business. You know what he actually thinks? He has a hypothesis that snorks aren't just a species - they are a new step in human evolution, or rather not a step - a branch... wow. Homos Norkus... or something like that. He wants to verify it, that's why he needs them - he's going to look at the DNA. And for the complete picture, it shouldn't be from just one - who knows, might be a fluke - he needs them from several and it would be better, of course, from different places, but that doesn't seem to be too important. But generally, he's a good guy, ought to help him out and it's interesting to me too - what if it really is a new step in evolution. The hunters delivered part of the batch to me. So if you agree, get about three more, for the purity of the experiment.\nThe task is not easy, no argument there, so I'm not rushing you. I think you can handle it in about three days. If you take it, you'll get something very worthwhile. I can offer: Whoever signed up to wipe out the snork spawn? We managed without you. So - sorry, we're all out of bananas. Regarding the snork boots! Someone brought so many, you could open a shoe store...
Obtain a controller's hand Barkeep needs a controller's hand. Does someone want to learn to control creatures too? Madmen... And most importantly, they're in a hurry, giving a five-day deadline. Sigh, Marked One... there's a job, but a dangerous one - I really don't know. Have you seen a controller? I think you have, even if from afar. Some very respected people from a very serious outfit contacted me. I couldn't refuse them. From the conversations, I understood that their management had a crazy idea... I don't even want to talk about it... damn psychics. Basically, find a controller, chop its hand off... Or cut it off, you have a knife, right? Drag it to me, I'll pay well.\nJust don't drag it out too long - the package has to be sent in five days...\nBring it - you'll get: Stalkers, who signed up for the controller? Thanks for understanding, but nothing is needed anymore. A stalker here already managed to obtain the controller's hand, so the rest of you don't need to rush anymore. Thanks everyone.
An artifact from Barkeep for Raven Deliver a strange artifact to Raven in the Dark Valley.\nThe matter is urgent. Need to make it in six hours. There is a stalker - Raven. He's currently hanging out in the Dark Valley, at the old pig farm. Collects all sorts of curiosities. Some completely useless at first glance, but he buys them. And pays well, without fussing. Anyway, they dragged some incomprehensible art to me, I contacted him - he said he'd take it. But he has a shipment scheduled right about now, it needs to be delivered quickly.\nIf you take this on, keep in mind, it must be delivered in six hours. Will you make it?
Anomalous substance from Barkeep for Sakharov Deliver a jar with the substance of a "Fruit Punch" anomaly to the eggheads at Yantar.\nNeeds to be dropped off by tomorrow. Listen, Marked One. The scientific brotherhood has settled at Yantar, studying the manifestations of the Zone, the wise guys... I pass them substances from the "Fruit Punch" anomaly from time to time. They show their gratitude, as a rule... Will you deliver a jar? Only make it quick, because this damn "Fruit Punch" isn't stable... Well?
Supplies from the Bar to the checkpoint Grub is running out at the Duty checkpoint at the Garbage. Need to quickly haul a box with food over so it doesn't spoil.\nNeed to manage it in about six hours. Grub is running out at the checkpoint at the Garbage. And hungry Duty members are no fighters! Anyway, will you deliver a crate of chow to them? Prapor seems to have accumulated all sorts of mutant stink, maybe he'll toss in some of their parts... Just hurry up, or they'll go feral there without eating!
A package from Barkeep to Sidorovich Need to quickly deliver a strange artifact to Sidorovich.\nNeeds to be delivered in 24 hours. Listen, Sidorovich ordered a rare artifact, well my guys hustled - got it... Now I need to find someone who can deliver this artifact to the Cordon... Maybe you're heading that way?\nJust keep in mind, the matter is urgent. Therefore, you need to make it today, tomorrow at the latest.
Wipe out the lair of wild mutant dogs in the Wild Territory Wipe out the lair of wild mutant dogs in the Wild Territory within a day. Several of our boys went on an expedition, one returned. All torn up, covered in blood, eyes glazed over. Most likely ran into dogs. There's a whole pack of them there. So, find their lair and slaughter them all to the last one.\nAnd don't drag it out, because these bitches breed like... like cats. So here's the deal: if you don't report back in a day, you don't get anything, I'll just talk to someone more experienced.
Wipe out the snork lair in the Dark Valley Wipe out the snork lair in the Dark Valley. A couple of days should be enough. Yeah... Looks like those who say the Zone is expanding are right. Snorks were seen in the Dark Valley, they never used to show up there before. Well, some people immediately started panicking here. Duty members promised to wipe out the snorks, but they just can't seem to get around to it. Will you take it?\nOnly here's the thing... I don't want to set unnecessary conditions for you, but still, do it in a couple of days at least. And if you won't make it, I'd better put the other men to work. I swear to god, I'm sick of these snorks!
Find lightweight artifact containers Find a new development by the scientists - a protective container for artifacts with a very low base weight. Rumor has it, a group of scientists carrying such containers disappeared in Tesla. Five days are allotted for the search. A rumor went around recently that a large group of eggheads poured through Limansk to Tesla. And, seemingly, they all kicked the bucket there. Some of our guys saw them carrying a new type of artifact containers. The weight of these new boxes is very low, and the protection is solid. Maybe you can look for what's left of the eggheads? I would pay well for a couple of such "suitcases". It would be good if you managed it in about five days. If you mess around longer, I'm afraid others will snatch them.\nAnd here is what awaits you in case of success: The lightweight artifact container is no longer needed. We already have everything. People, regarding the lightweight artifact container... They've already been brought in. No need to look anymore.
Obtain an RPK Barkeep needs a machine gun - an RPK. Gave a three-day deadline. Might need to ask Sherstyuk at Agroprom. A group of very serious people is getting ready to go into the very ass of the Zone. For this business they needed a machine gun...\nFrom what I've heard, you can get an RPK through the military at Agroprom. What do you say, will you take on this job? Just keep in mind, it needs to be pulled off quickly. The boys won't wait more than three days.\nThe serviceman really respects vodka, so I will sponsor you if it works out for you. The machine gun has already been obtained. Those in the loop - you can calm down. People, regarding the machine gun... No need to look anymore, one tough guy got it for me.
Obtain two Molot OP-SKS carbines Barkeep needs to obtain two Molot OP-SKS carbines within two days. It might make sense to trade for them with the dealer at the bandit base, in the Dark Valley. Some respected people approached me, they need reliable carbines in a solid caliber. A couple of Molot OP-SKS carbines would be just right.\nAs far as I know, the bandits in the Dark Valley have a dealer who can fence such things. What do you say, will you make the trip? Just make it quick, need to pull it all off in a couple of days maximum. I know the thugs there in the Valley aren't doing too well with grub, so you should buy some provisions before trudging over to them... The two Molot OP-SKS carbines are already in my possession. Those in the loop - you can calm down. People, regarding the pair of Molot OP-SKS carbines... No need to look anymore.
Deal with a stalker Deal with one of the stalkers. He owes the trader and the latter is very displeased.\nBarkeep asked to clarify the situation in about three days, then his patience will run out. I need to find a certain guy. He owes me big time, and it seems he has no intention of paying it back. For a while he was hanging around here, in the Bar. Strung me along for a whole month and fed me "tomorrows", and then bailed and doesn't show his face here anymore. Basically, need to find him and collect the debt. No need to kill or cripple him - that's bad for business. But to scare him or otherwise reach an agreement... You'll figure it out, I think. Everything needs to be resolved within three days maximum. I've been nice for too long as it is. If there's no news from you in that time or the debtor himself doesn't show up with confessions, I'll have to resort to more radical methods, even if it's slightly to the detriment of my business reputation. My debt was returned to me. Those in the loop - you can calm down. People, regarding my debtor, circumstances have come to light... No need to look anymore.
Well? What are you looking at, need something? I do. You need to return your debt to Barkeep. He tasked me to find you and pass on that you have three days left. Either you return what you owe, or you can order yourself a wreath with that money. Anyway, he is determined, so I suggest you better pay off the debt and quickly. Damn it! Where am I going to find that much for him now? I was planning to pay it back, but it's not working out yet, but I have... Drop it. I am not interested in your explanations. Especially since, as I understand it, you have already promised and explained enough to Barkeep, since he decided to resort to drastic measures. Don't waste time, basically. Just hear me out. Even if I'm out of cash and haven't acquired any decent swag, I have information that Barkeep will absolutely agree to write off my debt in exchange for. It's too risky for me to show up at the Bar myself. What if he hired some thugs to watch for me there, and they just beat the crap out of me right away, and won't listen to anything... Do I need that? It's another matter if I can pass on my information through a sane middleman. Do you catch what I'm getting at? Give me at least one reason to believe you. And most importantly - what is so important that you can tell Barkeep? I can tell him how his supplier is screwing him over, holding back a part of the goods. The scheme is quite clever. Barkeep is unlikely to figure it out himself anytime soon without a tip. Just don't ask me how I found this out. Everyone has their secrets.\nYou know, I think for this info my debt shouldn't just be written off, but it would be nice to get paid a little extra too. Let's do this: you give me a tier-three artifact or at least a couple of tier-two ones, and mind you, they must be in good condition. I need them for barter, Sidorovich won't accept heavily worn ones. So, in return, I'll give you a detailed note for Barkeep describing his supplier's "artistry", which you will then deliver to him personally. And let him decide for himself whether to believe it or not. If you doubt whether I made all this up, here is something for you as a deposit. Looks like an art, but also like a trinket, but you can definitely sell it. How do you like my offer? Look for a fool somewhere else! I warned you, decide what to do next yourself. And I'll keep your deposit, so you think next time who you're planning to fool. Doesn't sound too convincing, honestly. On the other hand - a deposit, although I haven't agreed yet... I need to think. Well, what do you say, haven't you decided to accept my offer? Time is ticking... Here goes nothing! Here's a tier-three artifact. Give me the note. Mind you, I'll read it, and if it seems to me like you decided to fool me... Here goes nothing! Here are two tier-two artifacts. Give me the note. Mind you, I'll read it, and if it seems to me like you decided to fool me... Not ready to give an answer yet. Phew... thank you. That's a weight off my chest... Read it, of course. No tricks. Only if you don't know your way around these matters, you won't understand much, I think.\nYeah, you can keep that deposit as a sign of my gratitude. Yeah... I hope Barkeep makes better sense of your scribbles than I do. Take care. How are things? Haven't taken my note to Barkeep yet? No, but I definitely will, don't worry.
About your debtor. I found him. Yeah? Did you manage to convince him to return what he owes? Judging by the fact that you aren't rushing to pull swag out of your backpack, the answer is negative... Oh, I convinced him alright, but he wants to pay up in a rather peculiar way. Here is a note, read it. According to him, for this information you'll be the one owing him. Let's see... Oh, shit! So that's why I can't balance the books on shipments for the third month now. Someone is going to answer for this...\nWell, what can I say? You know how to work with people, Marked One. And what exactly did I earn?
Find out where the package is Need to find out where the package disappeared to within a couple of days and return its contents to the trader or pay for it. Not long ago I sent two goons to deliver a package to someone. Two for reliability, and so they'd keep an eye on each other too. It wasn't exactly anything important in there, but the package was urgent, yet it didn't reach the recipient, and those boys disappeared - both of them. It's the Zone, obviously, they might have stepped into something. But the other day I was informed that one was seen. So, could you go to him and find out what's what? Maybe they fenced it, then I clearly don't like that approach, or maybe they didn't get along and had a falling out, and dropped the job - I don't know... Their relationship doesn't interest me - I'm only interested in commodity-money relations. Well, you get it - I need him to return the contents or the equivalent value, because even though the recipient is a little upset, he is still waiting. In short, resolve this somehow in a couple of days, no more, that's how much longer the recipient agrees to wait. The missing package turned up, no need to look anymore. People, the couriers have been found, circumstances have come to light... No need to look anymore.
Stalker, looking for someone? Looks like it's you... Barkeep sent me to you. Where is the package? Don't make such a surprised face - the package that you and someone else were carrying to the recipient... Where is it? The package? Talk about bad luck... I thought everything would just blow over and settle down with time... See, here is how it happened - we had to run from a chimera, and we had this crate... It's heavy, so the chimera clipped me, I still can't recover from it. I dropped it then, sealed, thinking we'd pick it up once we fought it off. And then an emission hit, and later we came back to the spot - the crate is torn open, the junk is gone. We looked around the area, found a couple of rare artifacts - "Crystal Thorn". I think some anomaly shifted and tore the crate apart. And now, how do we bring an opened crate to the client? And we can't go back to Barkeep, he'll skin us alive - he'll say there were a dozen such arts in there - you can't prove otherwise... My partner says: we need to lay low for now, act like we disappeared, and we split these "Thorns", but agreed not to sell them for now - just in case we have to return them after all. Well, looks like that time has come... Have you ever heard of Barkeep giving up on his junk that easily? He wants you to return the contents or the equivalent value to him in three days. Because, look out - he'll get mad. Remember a simple truth: nothing ever just settles down easily, and when it surfaces, it's usually too late to resolve anything. Yeah, I understand everything... But I only have one "Crystal Thorn", my partner has the other. I will go to him right now, tell him what happened... And you tell Barkeep for me that everything is on track. I didn't know the job wasn't blown yet, otherwise I would have done it myself. Is it a long walk? I had my own plans... Nah, not far. If luck is on our side, we'll deliver the package before dark. Damn it, you sat here all this time, waiting for everything to settle down on its own... And now I have to run around sweating like a pig? To hell with you guys! To hell with you... I will go to the Bar. And hey - crawl as best as you can, just make it fast. You helped me out, thank you... I'll try to be quick... And here, pass this little art to Barkeep too, as an apology, sort of. Tell him not to be angry, everything will be done. Uh-huh... Time is, you know, running out. What else? We discussed everything, didn't we... What needs to be delivered? Plans changed - I will go to the Bar. Don't huff, fellow, everyone has their own path... You should understand! Hello, friend! How are you doing? Alright? Good.
Well, as agreed - I saw the courier, found out about the delivery. And? What's the deal with those blockheads? The usual stuff, got into a mess. Here, take it, he passed on an art with apologies... And they themselves promised to deliver the package before dark. Well, alright. And you did a good job, Marked One. It's a pleasure doing business with you. I see I didn't lose out either. Talk is cheap. How are we doing on what I'm owed?
Find out about a buddy Find a Bar regular within a couple of days and find out why he hasn't been coming in. Not long ago, a certain guy used to drop by here often. I loved shooting the breeze about life with him, soul-to-soul, over a cup of tea. Yeah... And then he stopped showing up. Well, I think, it's the Zone. Probably got him too. But the other day a stalker mentioned that the guy is actually alive. Can you find him? Ask why he isn't coming in? Maybe he took offense? Just don't drag it out, or he'll leave... Okay? My buddy showed up, so I know everything I need. People, my buddy has been found, circumstances have come to light...
Hello stalker. Getting acquainted? How should I address you? Just Marked One, I don't remember any other name. Well, I guess we know each other now, Marked One. What are you doing here? On business or just dropping by for a visit? Well... Depends on what you consider business. Barkeep is wondering - why aren't you dropping by the bar? Why am I not dropping by? How should I put it... It's shameful to admit, of course, but... I'm hiding. I owe Baldy - the devil tempted me to throw dice with him. And I lost. Seemed like not that much, but I can't pay it back yet. Maybe I can help? I have a little swag. Is that so? Although. Maybe you can. Barkeep probably won't mind either. Just need a couple more arts. Tier one. And yet, I can't show my face because of this. You don't have any on you? Not on me, but I have some in my stash... Hold on. Yeah, I don't mind parting with that kind of stuff. Here. Where else would I go, I'll wait. Oh wow! Well thank you. I'll be at the bar in a few days then. Tell Barkeep exactly that. Let him wait. Alright, I'll tell Barkeep. Marked One, well hello. How are you doing? Alright generally. You said you were short two simple arts? Yeah, I am. They'll be here soon, wait. I found some. Here, take them. Hello, Marked One, what are you doing here? I'm heading to the bar soon, are you still on your own business?
I met with your buddy. And? How is he, alive and well? When will he be at the bar? Did he say? He's planning to in a few days. He has a debt to Baldy. I helped your friend out a bit. Aha, I see. Well then, I respect you more for it. I suppose I could compensate your expenses. It was nothing, just a couple of lousy arts. Basically - pocket change. Although sometimes even pocket change is needed.
Find out from the stalker what happened to his partner Find the stalker known by the nickname Upyr and find out from him about his partner's fate.\nThree days for the search should be enough. That's it, I've had it with this guy! Oo-o-oh, bastard! He doesn't suck blood from people, he sucks their luck. Whoever he goes with - they all bite the dust! He's the only one alive and well! Fifth time already! In short, there's something fishy going on here. And about his last partner, Valera Skeleton, they say his fate was absolutely terrifying.\nI was the one who invited Valera to the Zone, you know. He was my neighbor, our parents' dachas were right next to each other. And now his father and mother don't even have anything to put in the grave.\nHave a friendly chat with this snake. And I won't hold out on you. So, basically, Upyr confessed. Seems like he had nothing to do with it. People, stop harassing Upyr, circumstances have come to light...
Well? What? If you want something, then speak, if not - take a hike! Why are you being so rude? I don't think I did anything to you. By the way, they call me Marked One, and you? Marked One, you say? Well... I've heard of such a stalker. Were you the one transported in the truck with the corpses? And my name is Renat. That's enough. Well, nice to meet you then, Renat. And as for the truck - who knows, I don't remember anything. Woke up, lying in a basement, and what happened before that - nothing left in my head. Yeah? You're lucky. I mean it honestly. I'd gladly smash my own head against a rock to make everything that accumulated in there go away. So many deaths... What happened? Why did it turn out like that? Why? E-e-eh-h-h... Carelessness, unwillingness to think, greed. It's all mixed in here. Take my first partner, shied away from a rat! Whether it bit him or something else, well he jerked, tripped and flew full swing into a "Springboard". He was a good guy. Cheerful.\nThe blind dogs chased the second one onto a rock, knocked the assault rifle out of his hands. And he didn't even have a backup gun... Said - why should I lug around extra weight. Now he's not lugging anything...\nThe third... The third was Slava Runner... How many did we... We made three runs together, yeah. Had decent profit. And then, he saw an artifact in a little swamp.\nThe Geiger counter is crackling like a stuck pig, the art is bouncing there in the depths, and Slava keeps trying to catch it. He caught it. Only an hour later he couldn't move anymore. Burned all his insides out with radiation. And we didn't have any anti-rads on us. Didn't think we'd climb into radiation, figured we'd drink it off with vodka if anything... I managed to drag him to the base, but he passed away the next day. Yeah... Rough... Diman, that's my fourth partner, died purely by accident, really. A stupid rodent flew into an anomaly, it crushed it and spat out the remains... Well, a bone hit Diman square in the eye, right on target. An accident. Unbelievable, but... An accident. Yeah, nobody is immune to accidents. What about the fifth? Skeleton? Yeah, a terrible death happened to him...\nI was walking first at the time. We were crossing a small bridge over the dry bed of a creek in a village. It was quiet. Suddenly a scream, a crack... Valera fell through. And straight into "Fruit Punch"... Right into the center. While I was figuring out what was what, he was already dissolved up to his waist.\nHis scream still rings in my ears...\nNothing was left of him there.\nI climbed down there later... Scooped up some of that jelly into a jar. There's a gold crown in there. Here. That's all that's left of a person...\nI've sworn it off now! No more partners. I'd rather die myself than go through that again... Understood. I have a request. Don't you want to pass the jar with the remains to this Valera's parents? At least there will be a grave... I can give it to Barkeep - he has contact with the relatives. Yeah? Alright. Here. Take it. I'm surrounded by ghosts even without this. They will always be with me now. Farewell. Farewell... Yeah? And what?
Talked to him. Found out what happened to his partners. I think it really was just accidents. The Zone is like that. And how am I going to look my neighbors in the eyes now... Here, a jar with the substance that dissolved your acquaintance. You can see his tooth in there. Pass it to the parents, let them bury him. I will. Thank you. How should I reward you? See for yourself. I wouldn't take anything, but I ran out of cash while finding all this out...
Find out the quick stalker's secret Find Sparrow and find out how he flies so fast. Need to track him down in three days. There's one very suspicious guy. Flies back and forth like a bird. Here today, there tomorrow. Very fast. Rumor has it that he has some kind of drug that helps him make inconceivable leaps. Will you take it upon yourself to find this "flyer"? It would be good to get this drug for a test. Five doses for a start. Then stalkers will be able to search for artifacts much faster... So, basically, the sparrow's miracle drink isn't needed for now. Maybe later. In short, people, you can stop shaking Sparrow down, someone here already hustled and shook him down...
Marked One, hello! Looking for someone?
Stalker, looking for someone? Looks like it's you... You are Sparrow, right? People say you run too fast. Unusual. Hmm. The things you hear in this Zone. God forbid you aren't lazy, and they immediately trumpet all sorts of tall tales! And our people are gullible... But still, between us - what is it that helps you? I wouldn't mind slipping through some place quickly myself sometimes, or jumping over some wall... Hmm... Well... Only between us. I have a certain drug. Not much left, though. Here. I can trade it, if you really need it. A can for an art. How about it? A can of swill? One won't be enough, I think. Just to taste. And how much for five? Five? Well... If I think about it... Give me a couple of good arts. Tier two. Then we're in business. It's sketchy to give such arts for who knows what. I'll think about it. Alright, deal. I have those, here. Eh, I sold too cheap! Well whatever, a man said it, a man gave five cans. Here, take it. Alright, see you, man. You again? Made up your mind, thinker? Well yeah. Here are the artifacts. Come on, as agreed, five cans of swill. I was just running past, decided to say hello. Hello, friend! How are you doing? Alright? Good.
Well I saw this "flyer", had a friendly chat... And? Did you find out what kind of crap lets him fly? Well here, looks like regular cans of energy drink, but they add immense strength. As you wanted - five cans for a test. An energy drink? Well we thought he had some miracle art. Alright, you didn't let me down, I owe you one... And what do you owe me exactly? Don't drag it out. I spent a fair bit with this "flyer" of yours.
Bring "Fireball" artifacts Obtain three "Fireball" artifacts for the scientists' research within five days. We managed to obtain an artifact in laboratory conditions! This is a breakthrough! Now the whole world will hear about our success. And a Nobel Prize is just around the corner! It's a unique artifact - "Pellicle", its main quality is protection against chemical burns. Incredible! But to obtain the source material we need "Fireball" artifacts, well at least three pieces, do you know of such? They are encountered quite often...\nIf you manage to find them in five days and beat the other stalkers - then I think on behalf of science we could present you: Respected stalkers! "Fireball" artifacts are already available in sufficient quantity. We thank you for your willingness to help. Respected stalkers! "Fireball" artifacts have been delivered in sufficient quantity, we don't need any more for now.
Find "Gravi" artifacts Deliver three "Gravi" artifacts to the scientists within five days. We have come very close to understanding the nature of gravity! In fact, very soon we will be able to create a new generation of engines on an anti-gravity basis and, quite possibly, the road to the stars will open for us. For this we need "Gravi" artifacts, at least three pieces! And quickly...\nWe sent out an announcement, stalkers are already looking, but perhaps you will be luckier and it is you who will receive the promised reward: Sakharov on the line. The reward for the "Gravi" artifacts has already been issued. Thank you all for your understanding... Sakharov on the line. The reward for the "Gravi" artifacts has already been issued to one lucky stalker. Thanks to the rest for your understanding...
Obtain "Soul" artifacts "Soul" artifacts are needed by the scientists for research in the field of space-time, need to deliver at least two pieces. Deadline is five days. Our research complex is on the verge of discovering the secret of space-time. The possibility of teleportation is not fantasy! The "Vortex" is an anomaly that compresses space, and doesn't just gravitationally affect objects, as some of my rigid theoretical opponents think, sitting in warm research institutes, diligently chewing chalk. Their glasses will fog up when they find out what results science can achieve in the field! Please try to get us a couple of "Soul" artifacts and we will be able to accomplish the impossible!\nDo not worry, we have special funds for such a matter: Regarding the "Souls", I apologize, the funds were cut and we won't be able to reward you for your help... Regarding the "Souls", I apologize, but what we were able to allocate for payment - one of the stalkers has already received it...
Obtain "Moonlight" artifacts Provide the scientists at Yantar with "Moonlight" within five days. A couple of these artifacts are needed. We urgently need materials to continue our research in the field of alternative energy. You see, we have learned to generate electricity using artifacts. True, the efficiency is not high enough yet. We have achieved the best results with the "Moonlight" artifact. Bring us a couple of samples for further experiments.\nI think we will find a way to reward a skilled and lucky stalker: This is Sakharov from Yantar. We have already been brought "Moonlight" artifacts in the required quantity. The "Moonlight" artifacts in the required quantity were delivered to us by a stalker nicknamed Marked One... I ask the rest of you not to worry about this!
Obtain "Sea Urchin" artifacts To improve the protective properties of materials, scientists need two "Sea Urchin" artifacts. Deadline is five days. You probably know that our suits possess the best protection against the harmful effects of this dangerous place. The secret is that we impregnate them with an essence from a special, quite rare, artifact. Soon we are expecting our ranks to be replenished by young but very gifted men of science and, to ensure their safety, we need to prepare several such protective suits. Therefore we urgently need two artifacts from the S-234 series, you stalkers call it "Sea Urchin".\nAs a reward we could offer one of the special protective suits, a very good one: Sakharov here from the bunker at Yantar. The officials denied clearance to our young colleagues, so we don't need artifacts for new protective suits for now. Sakharov here from the bunker at Yantar. The necessary amount of artifacts to produce protective suits has been delivered to us. No more are required for now.
Bring snork body parts Getting three snork fragments in these parts is no problem. Three days deadline. We met Semyonov when I was giving lectures on genetics at the university, and he was my student. That's how I became his academic advisor. Back then we were just lifting the veil of secrecy on genome modification. What was I talking about? Ah yes. For genetic research we will need samples of fresh muscle tissue cells from a snork. For the genetic material you will have to go to the swamps. There is a hypothesis that snorks as a species are a new step in human evolution. To know for sure, we need a DNA sample! Three fragments will be enough. If anyone is still looking for snork fragments: they have already been brought. Next time. If anyone is still looking for snork fragments for us: they have already been brought. Be quicker next time.
Obtain flesh eyes It's worth keeping your body away from the eggheads just in case! But five flesh eyes, so be it, I'll get them. Three days deadline.
