Good news, young man: we have a very interesting task for you! I think that you, as a thinking individual with sufficient life experience, will appreciate the full revolutionary nature of my colleagues' idea. The fact is that research has shown: the eyes of the creatures colloquially known as "flesh" are equipped - are you listening carefully? - with olfactory receptors! Thus, they not only see with their eyes, but also smell with them! We are preparing for an operation to transplant this miracle eye into one of... of our... volunteers. I believe a real sensation awaits us! But we need five donor organs. Will you help us? This is Sakharov. Flesh parts are no longer needed... already brought them. This is Sakharov. Flesh parts are no longer needed, one quick lad already brought them.
Obtain boar legs Bring a boar ham to the scientists. In principle, they'll make do with ten hooves. Three days deadline. Greetings to you... uh... wanderer! I'm glad you decided to visit us: we just need a person to participate in a very important experiment. Colleague Benter wants to try to cook something edible from the local fauna for a practical experiment to study the effect of mutated protein on human organisms. For now we decided to settle on boars. We need hams. Boar legs, you understand? If you take on this task, please, choose a plumper specimen. A dozen, for a start, will be enough. Informing you: Boar parts have already been brought to me. Thank you everyone! Informing you: Boar parts have already been brought to me. Thank you everyone!
Find pseudodog tails Provide the scientists with pseudodog tails for their strange experiments. Need five in total. Three days deadline. Hello, colleague! We still cannot unravel the mechanism of the amazing properties observed in the pseudodog, so we decided to change the vector of our searches. This time we will start from the end... Why are you smiling? What is so... ah, yes. I think I understand. You see, young man, we need the tails of this creature, located at the end... yes, at the end of the body. I was by no means talking about the reproductive organs of this mammal! For those, perhaps, you'll have to take a walk next time. But for now, bring us about five tails. Pseudodog tails have already been brought to me. If anyone is still looking - you can save yourselves the trouble. Pseudodog tails have already been brought to me. If anyone is still looking - you can save yourselves the trouble.
Bring cat tails Obtain a couple of cat tails. I'll manage in a day. Our scientific luminaries, the ones from the younger generation, needed cat tails. What they want to study there, I have no idea, but Sergeich ordered to assist. I don't want to ask the hunters again for such a trifle. Maybe you'll take it upon yourself to cut a couple of tails off this meowing brotherhood? There are a lot of them running around here in the Swamps. There's a passage from the base behind the main building, they sometimes run right in here from there. Seems their lair is nearby. So you try your best, just need a couple.\nI think you'll manage in a day. If you take it, I can offer for the work: I'm calling about the cat tails. Have everything already - don't need any more for now, we thank you... I'm calling about the cat tails. Have everything already - a stalker helped out.
Obtain flesh eyes It's worth keeping your body away from the eggheads just in case. But three flesh eyes, so be it, I'll get them. I'll manage in a day. Listen, you showed up right on time, Marked One! There's a little job - phew, an interesting one! Can you imagine what our brainiacs dug up - you've seen the local swine more than once.. well, this flesh. So, turns out in its eye - it has these... olfactory recipes, got it?! They don't just look with them, they also smell with them - with their peepers! See what miracles there are here, it turns out! So a scientific idea came up - to try a transplant, a "transportation" so to speak. And for this experiment they need a few fresh organs - eyes, I mean. Seems they'll implant them in dogs, we have enough of that "goodness", but no eyes - our grad students are only strong in the scientific part, and to take down a flesh and on top of that not ruin its peepers - they won't be able to. And they won't be let out either... So, will you help our professors? \nYou're an experienced stalker, what's it to you to gouge out a couple of eyes? Nah... better bring three, one will be a spare in case they screw up. And I'll find a way to thank you: Regarding the flesh eyes: they conferred here and decided that it's too early to move on to practical experiments, so sorry for the false promises. A stalker here already managed to obtain the flesh eyes, so the rest can stop stressing over it for now.
Obtain boar hams Bring six boar hooves to the scientists in the Swamps. Want to become self-sufficient? Yeah, right. Stalker experience shows that this is fraught with serious health problems... I'll deliver them in a day or two. Listen, we have a little job lining up in my department - supply. Silvestr let slip to Sergeich that on the mainland he worked with meat, processing - salting, smoking, sausage and canned goods... There, and Ivan Sergeich got fired up with the idea - wants to try to cook something edible from the local beasts, and feed someone - for a test... volunteers, I mean. And then, you know, we'll see - if everything is fine, then why not - it'll be an addition to the state grub, because by mistake they dumped nothing but pearl barley with beef on us... makes you sick just looking at it. There... and figured - need to start with boars. Need their legs, about six will be enough for a test. Cut the hooves - if a roast doesn't work out, at least Silvestr will boil some meat jelly. If you take on this job, choose the fatter ones. Well, you understand. \nThe reward is a separate conversation. I can offer: Our Silvestr got very sick after his experiments... So for now the camp in the Swamps doesn't require boar meat. Announcing! One of the volunteer helpers has already delivered the required amount of hooves to us...
Find pseudodog body parts Provide the scientists with pseudodog tails for their strange experiments. For a start, tails from three heads will be enough... yes, such a task for the next couple of days. Listen, Marked One, aren't you afraid of pseudos? There's a little job... I was talking to our researchers here - they just can't unravel the dog secrets. They try this way and that way - and nothing works out. Therefore, they decided to go another way - by the method of Contradiction, ever heard of it? If the problem can't be solved from the head - try from the end. And stop grinning - I'm talking about the end of the body, the tail I mean... and not at all what you thought. Need the tails of these mutts. Want to try to check something, but need tails from different ones. From three will be enough, for a start. Will you take it upon yourself to gather that many? \nAs a reward I can offer: Stalkers, the scientists in the Swamps have dropped the need to study pseudodogs from the "end". Accordingly, do not bring tails to them for now... A stalker here already managed to obtain the pseudodog tails, so do not bring tails to the Swamps for now.
Obtain blind dog tails The ecologists need ten blind dog tails. Do they by any chance want to learn to navigate by scent too? And most importantly, they're in a hurry, giving a two-day deadline. Sigh, Marked One... there's a job, trifling, but urgent. Our grad students got an itch again. If it weren't for Sergeich, I would personally flog all these academic youths to take them down a peg. They've drank so much of his blood already. Anyway... They need blind dog tails, urgently. They hatched another grandiose idea. I asked the local hunters, but they don't really want to chase dogs... loafers. And our prodigies are demanding it, just find them and that's it. So... maybe you'll take it? There are plenty of these blind dogs in the Swamps. Bring ten tails. I think you'll manage in a day or two, otherwise they'll nag me to death.\nYou'll get this for it: Stalkers, who signed up for the blind dog tails? Thanks for understanding, but nothing is needed anymore... A stalker here already got the blind dog tails, so the rest of you don't need to rush anymore.
Obtain tushkano heads Pakhom is asking to chop off six tushkano heads. And most importantly, needs it fast, gives only two days. We are putting together a container with all sorts of things for our colleagues from the Mainland here. They have an interest in local tushkano parts. The hunters helped out, but we are just slightly short of a full batch - about six heads, to make it an even number. The job is a piece of cake - chop some heads off. And for this piece of cake job I'm offering a good reward. Just don't drag it out too long - a day, well maybe two and I'll send the package. The goods are perishable. Will you take it?\nYou'll get this for it: Stalkers, who signed up for the heads? Thanks for understanding, but nothing is needed anymore... A stalker here already managed to chop off the heads, so the rest of you don't need to rush anymore.
Vodka from Pakhom for Brom Need to deliver ten bottles of vodka to the ex-Duty member - Brom, by tomorrow. A stalker named Brom has been helping us out a lot lately with rare mutant parts. We need to bring him ten bottles of vodka in gratitude. Will you take it? Just don't drag it out, you need to make it by tomorrow.
Scientific calculations from Ivan Sergeevich to Sakharov Deliver the latest calculations from Ivan Sergeevich to Sakharov at Yantar. A couple of days maximum. Need to deliver the latest data that our scientists, headed by Ivan Sergeevich, obtained on one of the scientific problems to Yantar. Will you deliver it? Only make it quick - a couple of days maximum.
Food for the scientists in the Gut sector Deliver supplies for the scientists working in that area to the head hunter, Ignat, in the Gut. Need to make it by tomorrow. We have a group working in a remote area. Stalkers call that area the Gut. We need to pass them a crate of provisions. It's better to do it through the hunters who hang out there. Ignat will pass it on to its destination. Will you go? Just don't drag your feet - you have a day for everything.
An artifact from Pakhom to Raven Deliver an unusual artifact to the leader of a stalker group, Raven, in the Dark Valley. Need to make it by tomorrow. There is a group of stalkers in the Dark Valley, at the old pig farm. Their leader is Raven. If it's on your way, will you take it upon yourself to deliver an artifact to him? He is waiting. It's urgent, you need to make it today, tomorrow at the latest. Do you agree?
An artifact from Pakhom to Limansk Deliver an unusual artifact to the trader Mikhalych in Limansk. Deadline is three days. There is a small town in the north - Limansk. There is a trader there, Mikhalych. If it's on your way, will you take it upon yourself to bring an artifact to him? He is waiting. In about three days - maximum. Do you agree?
Medkits from Pakhom to Huntsman in the Red Forest Pakhom is passing ten scientific medkits to Huntsman in the Red Forest. Need to make it in three days. Ivan Sergeevich was very pleased recently with the biomaterial we received from our regular supplier from the Red Forest, his nickname is Huntsman. As a token of gratitude, we could pass him ten new medical treatments. Could you be our courier? He is waiting. It's urgent, three days maximum. Do you agree?
Supplies from Yantar to the Bar Deliver a box with provisions to Barkeep. Preferably faster, within 24 hours, or they will spoil. Oh, you have very good timing... There is a small request - are you acquainted with Barkeep? Yes? Excellent. He sometimes forwards us quite interesting anomalous formations and generally facilitates, so to speak. And we, in turn, sometimes supply him with provisions. And you see, a situation has arisen - we have the supplies, but no one to deliver them. Could you help us - take a small package to the Bar? Do not worry about payment, Barkeep is a responsible person and will not leave a courier without a reward. Only let's do it quickly.
New gear for Duty members from the Yantar scientists Deliver a new version of the protective suit to Petrenko in the Bar for testing. Deadline - by tomorrow. Marked One, you look like a fairly honest person. We sometimes provide assistance to our friends. We recently received a new version of protective gear. I ask you to deliver the samples to Mr. Petrenko. He quite often conducts testing with various types of protective suits at our request. Do you have the opportunity to fulfill this request? Just don't get distracted by anything - it needs to be done quickly.
Payment for artifacts from the Yantar scientists Take money in a briefcase to Shinkar at the Warehouses. Deadline is 24 hours. One of the well-known stalkers, everyone knows him by the name Shinkar. He probably didn't get such a name for nothing, he won't miss out on extra profit... Yes, where was I... He gets certain artifacts for our needs. Not for free, of course. He doesn't believe in electronic transfers, so we have to send cash with couriers. Will you take it upon yourself to take a briefcase with cash to him? Will you manage in a day? I think you won't let us down?
Containers from the Yantar scientists Sakharov is passing a batch of artifact containers to the Freedom members... Need to make it by tomorrow. At the request of the leader of a stalker group, his name is Lukash, we sometimes pass on artifact containers. Will you take it upon yourself to deliver a batch of five? I hope you won't make us wait long? A day, that is the deadline in which you must manage.
Records from the Yantar scientists to Vakhtang Sakharov is passing information on his decrypted data to the trader of the mercenary group at the Army Warehouses... Deliver within a day. Hmm... Marked One... At the request of the trader of a special group of stalkers, Vakhtang - that's what he calls himself, we performed a series of calculations on our equipment. Will you take it upon yourself to deliver the results of these calculations? Only I will ask you not to delay in this case. The documents must be with this person in a day.
Records from the Yantar scientists for Ivan Sergeevich Sakharov is passing information on the latest data to Pakhom, for Ivan Sergeevich, in the Swamps... Need to deliver it in two days. We have processed the latest data received from our colleagues from the southern station. Will you take it upon yourself to deliver the results of these calculations? Only I will ask you not to delay in this case. The documents must be with colleague Grigorovich in a couple of days.
Ammo from the Yantar scientists to Huntsman Sakharov asks to deliver ammo to Huntsman in the Red Forest. Exactly 24 hours are allotted for this. Are you not planning to go to the Red Forest anytime soon? I urgently need to pass payment for his services to a certain person, everyone calls him Huntsman. He, you see, sends us curious specimens of anomalous formations from time to time, and we pay with ammo, so necessary to Huntsman in his trade. I have been completely overworked these past few days and therefore it completely slipped my mind that the last package has still not been paid for by us. I wouldn't want to offend our partner, let alone jeopardize the very possibility of further cooperation, in connection with which it is required to settle our debt as soon as possible.\nIf you are ready to take responsibility to fulfill this assignment no later than in 24 hours, then a reward awaits you.
Clear out the snork lair Wipe out the snork lair at Yantar in half a day. I want to offer you a small reward, which you will receive in the event that the snorks dwelling in the swamp stop distracting me and my colleagues. Sometimes, during experiments, it's simply impossible to concentrate. Wipe out the wild dog lair Clear out the dog lair in the Wild Territory. They give you a day. Listen, we have a series of research activities scheduled in the Wild Territory, and it turns out there is a lair of mutant dogs there. It is necessary to secure the area by eliminating this threat. I know zoologists won't support me, but here, you must agree, is no zoo. Such creatures carry rabies, plague, and God knows what else.
Find lost equipment Find two abandoned devices in the Tesla area. Landmark - an old vehicle column. Need to make it in five days. There is one problem. If you help us resolve it, we will be able to reward you worthily... The bottom line is that two rather valuable devices were lost. Our colleagues were forced to return to the place of permanent deployment very quickly and, in the confusion of hasty packing, the valuable devices were not returned. The incident took place in sector twenty-three - you stalkers call it the "Tesla Zone". A rough landmark, according to our colleagues, is a column of old vehicles, in the eastern part of the sector. The devices are not very heavy - about five kilograms each. I have already spoken to several stalkers about this problem, but it seems to me that you have a higher potential for responsibility... Well? Will you have the opportunity? Attention please: the lost devices have already been written off. No need to risk searching for them. Gentlemen stalkers! The lost devices have already been found. Please calm down.
Obtain anomaly substance Obtain ten jars of "Fruit Punch" substance for experiments. Deadline is five days. We have begun a new cycle of experiments with reversible destruction of materials. At the moment, we very much need the substance of an anomaly called by stalkers "Jelly" or "Fruit Punch"... A volume of no less than ten special containers is required. We have no empty containers at the moment, but perhaps you could get the necessary amount from our colleagues in the Swamps? And we will manage to compensate your expenses. How do you view such a proposal? Experiments with anomaly substances are postponed for now. There is no funding. Gentlemen stalkers! We have collected the necessary amount of anomaly substance. No more is needed for now.
Bring observation data Retrieve data on memory cards from three measurement complexes in the "Misty Thicket". We have several measurement complexes deployed in different locations. Unfortunately, the remote radio channel is extremely unstable, and we have not been able to receive the necessary information for a long time. It is necessary to deliver cards with accumulated data from the complexes in the so-called "Misty Thicket". According to the latest information, three installations are still working there. If it is not too much trouble for you, I ask you to make a voyage there. I have already spoken with several stalkers on this subject, but there is no news yet. We can guarantee a very good reward for this job... Gentlemen stalkers. The data from the Misty Thicket has been received remotely. Therefore, I apologize for the trouble. Gentlemen stalkers! The measurement data from the Misty Thicket has already been received.
Deliver observation data Retrieve data on memory cards from four measurement complexes in the Swamps. We have several measurement complexes deployed in different locations. Unfortunately, the remote radio channel is extremely unstable, and we have not been able to receive the necessary information for a long time. It is necessary to deliver cards with accumulated data from the complexes in the area called by stalkers - the Swamps. According to the latest information, four installations are still working there. If it is not too much trouble for you, I ask you to make a voyage there. I have already spoken with several stalkers on this subject, but there is no news yet. We can guarantee a very good reward for this job... Gentlemen stalkers. The data of the observation complexes in the Swamps has been received remotely. Therefore, I apologize for the trouble. Gentlemen stalkers! The measurement data of the complexes in the Swamps has already been received.
Bring observation data Retrieve data on memory cards from two measurement complexes in the "Red Forest". We have several measurement complexes deployed in different locations. Unfortunately, the remote radio channel is extremely unstable, and we have not been able to receive the necessary information for a long time. It is necessary to deliver cards with accumulated data from the complexes in the area called by you, stalkers, the Red Forest. According to the latest information, two installations are still working there. If it is not too much trouble for you, I ask you to make a voyage there. I have already spoken with several stalkers on this subject, but there is no news yet. We can guarantee a very good reward for this job... Gentlemen stalkers. The data of the observation complexes from the Red Forest has been received remotely. Therefore, I apologize for the trouble. Gentlemen stalkers! The measurement data of the complexes in the Red Forest has already been received.
Obtain an Electrochimera kidney Obtain an Electrochimera kidney for research within five days. Our comrade scientists have long been trying to understand how exactly the Electrochimera generates such a strong discharge. They suspect that the kidneys are that very "generator". If you get one, there will be gratitude from the scientific brotherhood and from us!\nAnd this gratitude will be expressed in material form: Fighters, we have already collected a sufficient number of Electrochimera parts. Thank you for the valor shown! Defenders of humanity, thank you for your selfless valor! One of the stalkers has obtained the necessary amount of Electrochimera kidneys. But we will not stop there! We will continue to exterminate the spawns of the Zone - until total victory!
Eliminate zombies Present proof of activities to cleanse the Zone of zombies within three days. For five zombie body parts, Duty command promises to pay well. Lately, many are starting to disbelieve in the possibility of cleansing the Zone! Some unrest is starting among the personnel - panic is being born and mystical tendencies are brewing... And the so-called "corpses risen from the graves" - zombies, are the most dangerous to fighters whose conscious fortitude is not yet fully formed! Therefore, we call upon everyone - exterminate these spawns, they are not humans! They are monsters! Join the cause of cleansing!\nPresent body parts of at least five zombies as proof and we will be able to support your morale with concrete blessings of civilization: Fighters! We are experiencing temporary funding difficulties, so for now we cannot decently pay for the labor of cleansing the Zone. But I am certain - we will overcome everything on the path to a bright future! Comrades! I had to keep my word and give the reward for cleansing to one of the stalkers. But I am certain - we will overcome everything on the path to a bright future!
Eliminate chimeras Present proof of activities to cleanse the Zone of chimeras, for three of their body parts the Duty commander promised to pay well.\nThe offer is valid for three to four days. Sometimes ordinary people underestimate the dangers that the Zone can spew out. But we, soldiers of the Zone, frontline fighters - are called to protect our wives, mothers and children from the fiends of the Zone! And I appeal to all men capable of bearing arms - exterminate these monsters and children's happy laughter will be the reward for all the filth we are forced to deal with here!\nPresent body parts of at least three chimeras as proof and we will be able to support your morale with concrete blessings of civilization: Brothers in arms! We are experiencing temporary funding difficulties, so for now we cannot decently pay for the labor of cleansing the Zone. But I am certain - we will overcome everything on the path to a bright future! Comrades! I had to keep my word and give the reward for cleansing to one of the stalkers. But I am certain - we will overcome everything on the path to a bright future!
Ammo crate from Duty leadership Need to quickly take ammo to the Garbage checkpoint. Here is the deal. Things are tight with ammo at the checkpoint at the Garbage. Prapor has already busted my brain over the radio! You seem like a tough guy, I can feel the spirit of a true warrior - will you take a crate of ammo to them? You must understand - we won't entrust such a matter to just anyone! We will reward you! Well, I hope you understand - the matter is urgent. One foot here, the other already there!
Weapons from Duty command Skull needs a sniper rifle. They are rushing, gave a 24-hour deadline. One of our overly "righteous" guys, Skull, decided to start his own local war to redistribute spheres of influence. I was against it, of course, but the commanders' assembly decided to give him a chance. Basically, he contacted me - he urgently needs a sniper rifle. Deliver it, I think he'll find a way to reward you... Only, urgent means urgent!
Payment for Mikhalych from Duty leadership Deliver money to Mikhalych, the one in Limansk. Needs to be delivered in a couple of days. A good man has settled in Limansk. Everyone calls him Mikhalych. He forwards some curiosities here, supports our squads with supplies and gear on the spot... In short, need to pass him our next token of gratitude. In hard currency. You are an honest man, so I'm asking you... Will you manage in a couple of days?
Special suit for Wolf from Duty leadership Deliver a Duty scientific suit to Wolf. Need to manage to reach Limansk in half a day. Do you know Wolf? He is in Limansk right now. Wants to organize a raid to the center of the Zone from there, is looking for volunteer stalkers. While the Brain Scorcher is active, you can't get through there without special scientific gear, the psi-radiation is too strong. So I want him to test our armor. Maybe it will be possible to slip through in it. Will you be able to quickly, today, take this armored suit to him?
Eliminate zombies Eliminate zombified Duty members at Yantar. Recently we sent a group to Yantar... unfortunately, no one from the group returned. However, yesterday I was informed that not far from the scientists' mobile laboratory, near the lake, several zombified stalkers were seen - judging by the equipment, they are our fighters. We cannot allow them to remain in this terrible state. Your task: find and destroy what they have turned into.
Eliminate the flesh pack Eliminate the flesh pack at the Garbage. Must be completed within 24 hours. Observers recorded the movement of a large pack of nasty pig-like mutants, which everyone calls fleshes. They are currently in the Garbage area. As luck would have it, right now we cannot afford to allocate people to eliminate them, as... a certain important operation is being prepared. On the other hand, for an experienced stalker, it's a piece of cake. Will you take it upon yourself to help? We will pay well. Keep in mind that fleshes show a tendency to migrate, so it's necessary to finish them off quickly, within one day. Otherwise we'll have to track them down all over again later...\nAs for the reward:
Eliminate dogs Clear out the mutant dog lair at the Army Warehouses within 24 hours. Our observer at the Army Warehouses is asking for urgent help. Several mutants have set up a lair for themselves near his OP. Presumably, blind dogs, but possibly pseudodogs too. We have no need to make noise there right now, so this is a job for a neutral, like you. Will you take it? If so, you need to act quickly, before these creatures get to our man. The mutants must be slaughtered within 24 hours.\nHere is the reward that will await you in this case:
Eliminate the controller Eliminate the controller at Yantar. To complete this task, one must possess special skills. The scientists informed us that they spotted a controller at Yantar near the entrance to the underground laboratory (in the central building). Controllers are very dangerous, but I am sure you will handle it.
Take out the dog pack Need to deal with the dog pack at the Garbage in a day. We rarely entrust serious matters to stalkers - you have no discipline and no responsibility, it's a mess and idling! But on the other hand - this task is not so difficult as to run our guys ragged, especially since one group is already working there. In short - need to clear out a small creature lair at the Garbage. Preferably without any trouble, because there aren't many creatures there - no more than ten. Most likely dogs: a migration of a rather large pack was recently spotted in this area. You can proceed. You have a day to complete the task. And remember... the only reason a Duty member might not follow an order - is death! Even though you aren't ours yet, while carrying out our tasks, you are temporarily under the full responsibility of Duty!
Clear out the snorks Clear the tunnels of snorks at Yantar within 24 hours. An alarming report came from our sector of responsibility, from Yantar - the abandoned tunnels that served as a reliable shelter from emissions for our fighters are occupied by snorks. Hard to say where these creatures were blown in from, and it doesn't matter. We cannot send anyone to clear it out right now without distracting people from guarding the scientists' camp. Therefore, I suggest you take care of this. The snorks must be eliminated in the shortest possible time - maximum in 24 hours. Any questions? Ah, yes... About the reward:
Investigate the missing documents Find the missing documents or obtain convincing proof that they will not fall into the wrong hands. Task code: two-eighteen. Two days deadline. There is a delicate matter. Stalkers clashed with bandits recently, someone got shot and they scattered. Not a new thing, it happens. Only this time one of our men was among the thugs. He was supposed to pass on some documents. Who to pass them to and what's in them, shouldn't concern you.\nSo, the documents are lost.\nOne of the stalkers definitely participated in that skirmish. Ask him around, carefully. You know what I mean?\nI need either these documents - that's best case scenario, or a guarantee that they won't fall into improper hands... And it needs to be done quickly, if you don't find out in two days, there could be big problems. But if you find out in two days - my gratitude is guaranteed. Yeah! No need to mention me in the conversation! The code for this matter for contact is two-eighteen. Basically, talk to the stalker! Comrades! The case on two-eighteen is canceled! Comrades, circumstances have come to light regarding case two-eighteen... No need to look anymore.
Are you here on business or just passing by? On business. Word is, you guys had a skirmish with bandits recently? Anyone get shot? Well, they shot someone, and only wounded ours. What's it to you, plenty of shooting goes around... Just wondering... And the rest of the bandits got away? Maybe you know one of them? Hey, don't look at me like that... It's just that word is, these very thugs ripped off the eggheads. Snatched some papers from them. So they're asking to track down the loose ends. Promised to toss some supplies in for this job... Did they promise a lot?.. Well, we found some papers on a corpse, kept them under his coat - it was a folder, not in his backpack. But he was killed by a grenade and the papers were torn up bad and stained with blood, you can't even make out half of it, it's only good for kindling. Look here, the cover from that folder, I was thinking of making an insole for my shitkicker out of it... And the rest got away.\nBy the way, I even know what one of them is called and where he usually hangs out - he's a former stalker, you know, just wanted easy money... Yeah... Can't make a damn thing out here, it's all covered in blood. I'll take it as a souvenir, do you mind? I'll show it to the eggheads, maybe this is it... Uh... You already took something as it is. It's kinda suspicious. Your eyes are darting a bit, seems you aren't just looking for nothing. Want to make a profit on this? Basically, here's the deal: you give me an artifact - I'll give you the whole folder with papers, or rather what's left of them... I wouldn't mind making a profit on this either. Are you crazy? An artifact for some trash that you can't even use for kindling... And I don't feel like messing with the bandits. In short, forget it! I guess it's not meant to be. Use it for yourself, like you wanted. I won't go messing with the bandits. Maybe these are the exact papers he needs, let them wash them, glue them together, figure it out, they are eggheads after all. You convinced me, basically, let's do it for the artifact. I won't go messing with the bandits. Maybe these are the exact papers he needs, let them wash them, glue them together, figure it out, they are eggheads after all. You convinced me, basically, let's do it for the artifact. I won't go messing with the bandits. Maybe these are the exact papers he needs, let them wash them, glue them together, figure it out, they are eggheads after all. You convinced me, basically, let's do it for the artifact. I don't have anything on me... I'd better take a walk to the place where your fan of "easy money" hangs out. I hope they won't start shooting... You are greedy, I see. Guys like that don't live long. Suit yourself. Hmm, you never know where you'll find and where you'll lose... Take it. Good thing I didn't throw it away! And I did have the thought. Well, take care... Yeah yeah, take a hike... If you work up an appetite - you're welcome back... Yeah, good job. Bye. Ah! It's you again... Buying a dead donkey's ears? How's it going? Hey, hand over that trash of yours. Here is the art. Just passing by. Oh! I knew it, didn't throw it away. Here are these scraps. If anything, drop by, I'll gather some more wastepaper for you for artifacts. Alright, alright. We'll see. Hello buddy! How's life, friend? Everything alright? Dealing in wastepaper? Well, suit yourself.
I did some digging about the documents. Seems like no one read them and couldn't read them, because that bandit flew into an anomaly and it tore him apart along with the documents. That's somewhat hard to believe... Can you give me a guarantee that it was definitely this bandit and definitely with these documents that flew into the anomaly? And that nothing definitely fell into the wrong hands? Because this is very important... In your own interests... Yeah, I saw it myself... Was tracking him and then - bam! I dug through everything around there with my nose later, here, only found this. All that's left of these documents. Let's see, let's see... Hell if I know, no... Can't really make anything out - it's all covered in blood. But seems like these... Yeah, I suppose this is what we were looking for... Although... So this is all that's left? Alright, I'll believe you. Basically, you did your job, good work, and if anything surfaces, I know where to find you. Uh... Good work? I actually ran out of cash while running around on these "matters" of yours!
Gather boar hooves Bring ten boar hooves to Lukash within three days... What is he going to do with them? We accidentally discovered a certain property of boar hooves here... hmm... I can't say what it is yet. But if you manage to bring them in three days, about ten pieces, then I can reward you quite seriously: Free stalkers! I goofed up with the hooves, nothing is working out with them! So no need to drag them to me. Friends! We received the hooves we needed! We'll test them tonight!
Gather tushkano heads Twelve tushkano heads? And Freedom members will fly? Interesting stuff... Have you heard that tushkano brains make a very mind-blowing brew? No fatigue, brains work like a computer, you almost don't feel pain... And even, well I don't really believe it of course, they say the ability to move objects at a distance manifests! Hmm... We want to test these rumors... Will you help? We need just a trifle - a dozen tushkano heads... And for this swag is on me: Hmm, seems I drank a little too much the other day... Spouted off about flying, tushkano heads... In short, it's nonsense... Boys! Someone helped me out a bit with the tushkano heads here and in a few days we will have some real good stuff!
Bring a bulletproof vest Bring a new-pattern army armored suit within three days. Some of the military got new-pattern armored suits, modified for operations in Zone conditions. A modernized PSZ-7 series army armored suit with a beryllium coating. Army spetsnaz gear - Beryl-7MT. And figure this luck: recently ten warriors in such armor rushed to Yantar, but six returned on their own two feet, and three more on their shoulders. Get it? One stayed there. If you get his armored suit, we'll figure it out, and make such for ourselves too.\nBut we can't miss the moment here, so you only have three days for this job. The fancy army armor isn't needed anymore. People, the army armor has already been obtained. The rest don't need to worry.
Documents from the Freedom leader Need to give the documents to Borov within a couple of days. I wonder what's in there? You seem like an experienced guy, Marked One. There is business with one, not very attractive subject. Basically, Borov, I think you heard of him, has a certain interest in the Bar... Our plans cross with his here. In short, I have an idea how to shut those Duty members' traps and let stalkers manage their own lives freely. Will you take it upon yourself to pass a document quickly, today, tomorrow at the latest?
Artifact to the Cordon from Freedom members Quickly take an artifact to Sidorovich. Need to deliver it to the Cordon quickly, in a day or two. There is one matter, need to pass an artifact to the Cordon - to Sidorovich. This artifact is one of those that exhaust quickly, so it needs to be fast, one foot there, the other... also there. Well you know... The shortest path leads through the Bar, and ours aren't really welcome there... Will you make a run for it?
Artifact from Freedom members to Yantar Freedom members are passing an unusual artifact to Sakharov. Need to deliver it to Yantar quickly, in a day or two. Our guys from the Barrier found an unusual artifact on a zombie. Didn't do anything with it themselves - you never know... But informed Sakharov - he got interested... Maybe you're heading that way?\nNot that it's very urgent, but who knows these artifacts, suddenly it'll evaporate or something... We told Sakharov he'll have it in a couple of days. Will you take it?
Monster parts from Freedom members for the scientists Freedom members gathered a dozen bloodsucker jaws. Asking to pass them to the Swamps, to the scientists. Through Pakhom. Deadline is a couple of days, before they "sour". Heard about the eggheads in the Swamps? They study all kinds of dogs... We gathered a dozen bloodsucker jaws for them. Will you carry them? Only make it quick - while they are still fresh... A day, maximum two, and they must be with Pakhom. That's their quartermaster, the eggheads'.
Clear out the village Clear the village of bloodsuckers and, possibly, a controller. Damn, so many sucking freaks bred in the village - I can't even! Now people don't go closer than a hundred meters to it, except for the completely insane. And others also tell that they had hallucinations there... a controller was all we needed! In short, this needs to end. I won't force you - honestly wouldn't go myself. But if you aren't afraid, then my gratitude will know no bounds.
Eliminate the pack of boars and fleshes Eliminate the pack of boars and fleshes near the Freedom base. Extremely urgent. Need to manage in 6 hours. You are aware that the whole area northwest of our base is mined, right? It's clear as day that it's done against people... you could even say, very specific people. But recently boars and fleshes got into the habit of wandering near the minefield. We already heard several explosions. Here's a task for you: slaughter all these creatures to hell and back before they trample all our traps. Every mine counts for us, so you need to hustle.\nIf you manage in 6 hours, you'll get:
Eliminate the tushkano pack Eliminate the tushkano pack in the Wild Territory. There are no tushkanos anywhere near our base, even though these creatures penetrate anywhere. And recently there were a ton of them here - enough to make you dizzy. We spent two months dealing with them, heh-heh. Anyway. We figured out where the tushkanos were coming from to our base. From the Wild Territory, imagine that? There is a fear that these jumping rats will multiply, and come pouring to us again. We need a person who can deal with them. Will you go?
Find out about the bandit stash Find Bes and try to clarify the situation with the missing bandit stash. Recently a rumor passed that Borov's group's stash went missing. And supposedly one of the stalkers is involved in this. It wouldn't be bad to clear up this situation. Because the situation is strange - if someone took such rich swag, they would have dumped out of here long ago, but this stalker is still here. Will you try to get him talking? Maybe under the influence he'll tell what's what? I will be grateful for the provided information. Just don't drag it out too much if you want to stand out. I asked a couple of other people too, maybe someone will manage to find a cat in a dark room. Whoever was looking for the common stash. No need. Some things cleared up.. People, regarding the search for the stash, circumstances have come to light... No need to look anymore.
Ah! Well hello. What brings you here? Just thought I'd drop by, let's have a drop or two for all who are no longer with us... Just dropped by to say hello. Going about my business. Well then... Let's do it. Without clinking glasses... Huh? Well alright, take care... Hr-r-r... Strong stuff! Well? "Between the first and the second", they say, "even a bullet shouldn't whistle by"! To us and to hell with them? Phew... What filth... Alright, I'm heading out... Come on! It's kind of damp today... Well, let's go! O-o-oh! The darling warmed me up... Why are you frowning? You know how much I respect you! Solid as a rock! You pinned such scum to the nail. Let's drink to having more real men like us! Well... Alright. My tongue is already tangling. I should probably go. Come on! God, as they say, loves a trinity! You are a good one yourself! Helped us. And I crushed those bastards and will keep crushing them! I swear on the cross! That's exactly what's needed! They grabbed swag from ordinary stalkers. Animals! And living large! Creatures. If only we knew where they keep all they looted. I would give every man a share! Come on! Let's do it! To justice! I feel really bad... Need to take a nap. You just... Aha! We're floating... That's the thing... My tongue got tan... tangled. Did you hear about the bandit swag? Yea-a-ah! I heard too. Only it's a bust. Aha... Or not! Honest truth! What kind of bu... bust... Well, one for the road? Well to hell with it... I'm tired of this. Huh? Well? You're like a brother to me! Yeah... remember, the creatures wanted to... Whack. Me. Yeah? There. And wh-y-y-y? Because! I got one of theirs! And he supposedly kept their stash! But where - damned if I know... Maybe there was something in his computer. Only it broke. Dammit. Want me to give it to you as a gift? Telling you like a brother! Here. Take it. And don't offend me! You're... Like a brother! What? Huh? Well... Spot on! Oh? What? My head is splitting... What were we talking about? I don't remember anything...
I managed to get Bes talking. Although with difficulty. Look at you! You did it! And what are the results? Where is the stash? He says he doesn't know. Says he took a broken PDA from the dead stash keeper. Maybe there's something in it. Here is the PDA. I see. So we didn't find this stash. I thought as much. But we'll pick at the PDA. Maybe we'll pick something out. Well, overall - thank you. "Thank you" is a lot... How about something not quite so "big"?
Talk to the stalker Discuss the conditions for joining the Freedom group with the stalker. Need to manage in about five days. There is one stalker, a fairly lucky one, who expressed the opinion that our Freedom is quite attractive to him. Talk to him. Say that the desire is commendable, but it's preferable to break off a piece of his bounty for the common needs of our community. If you convince him, we will reward you. Just keep in mind, you are not the first one I sent. Better hurry. Find this potential friend of ours. People. Regarding our recruit. You can stop looking for him. People, regarding our recruit, circumstances have come to light... No need to look anymore.
Hmm? Do I know you? Or not? You're all mangled up. You probably don't know me, I'm Marked One. The head of one of the groups, his name is Lukash, says you can join them... Huh? People already came from him. They want too much. That swag I gathered is only mine and no other thugs have any right to it! Tell him exactly that. Well I'm not entirely in the loop - what do they want? And generally, what's this talk about joining? Well... Overall Freedom is a pretty righteous gathering. Without any special obligations, but they stand up for each other. Help to survive. If only they didn't extort you for joining... What are they extorting? A lot or what? A lot or not a lot, but it's all mine! Alright, not quite all. Hmm, and I could probably play on this, if... Yes. Only it's dangerous, of course. Will you be able to help? Here's the deal: I had a partner, kingdom of heaven to him, so he didn't give his share to the traders for safekeeping, well he was a bit greedy, and stashed his swag in a dangerous place. Well, and then he was unlucky, met a bloodsucker on a narrow path. But the swag, supposedly, stayed in place. Honestly, I won't risk going there myself, and my conscience bothers me a bit, but if you feel up to it, I can give you a tip on this stash. Then whatever is there, you'll give to Lukash as my contribution, and you'll take whatever is on top for yourself. Deal? In principle, the arrangement seems logical. And where is the stash? Well yes, logical. Only let's be frank: I respect you of course, but free swag has led more than one good person astray from the righteous path. Let's do this, you give me some good artifact, no lower than tier three, and then I'll outline the spot for you honorably. I feel kind of sketchy about it. Hard to believe... I'll think about it. Alright, here is the artifact. Where exactly? Think about it. I'm not in any particular hurry. Someone else might make up their mind while you're there thinking. Have you heard of the Red Forest? The place isn't far, but very dangerous. That's exactly where my buddy's stash lies, may he rest easy there... Putting the mark down now. Alright, I'll check it. Only you are aware of what happens to those who try to screw over a stalker named Marked One? Keep that in mind... Ah, hello, Thinker. Still thinking? Yes, and I advise you to do the same. What was it you wanted for the stash again? Thinking of bargaining? Won't work. A tier-three artifact and period. Well, what's up, how are things? Everything on track?
I talked to this tightwad. Convinced him. Is that so? When will he be here? Did he prepare the contribution? He passed on these capsules as a contribution. Is that enough? Well yes, it's enough. I had to run around a lot on these affairs of yours. So how about the payment.
Talk to the hunter Find one of the hunters and clarify the situation regarding the Duty faction in the Gut. Deadline is five days. Lately, fighters of the Duty faction have started appearing very frequently in the border territories. It is completely unclear how this aligns with their ideological calls to cleanse the Zone. One of the hunters in the Gut can clarify the situation in this sector. If you manage to find him - figure out all the nuances. Well, and then... We'll see then. So what? Will you go looking for this hunter? People. The issue with the Gut is postponed for now. Stand down. People, regarding the situation in the Gut, circumstances have come to light... Stand down for everyone else for now.
Hello, buddy. What's your name? Hello to you too, buddy. They call me Marked One, haven't you heard? Marked One? Yeah, I've heard about you, they said you were a tough stalker and all that? Is it true or what? Nah, I'm just an ordinary guy, they exaggerate mostly. I have a little question for you. Being modest? Well, that's your business. And what's the question? Duty members have started turning up in the Gut frequently... What do you think they are doing here? Seems Duty mostly works on "cleansing"... Hmm... How should I put it... There is one suspicion... Not even a suspicion, but almost an established fact... Well? Do you understand?\nWhy the surprised look? You know yourself - everything costs something...\nIn short, you owe me two tanned pig skins, then I will lay out what is the absolute truth... Is your "truth" worth two skins? I'll think about it... Hmm... Alright, here are the skins, lay out your "truth". It's worth it, it's worth it! I'm telling you...\nSomeone could rake in serious dough on this matter. You helped me out, thank you... I was just short for a coat, I promised someone...\nAlright, listen here: the military kicked the Duty members out of the Swamps... Well you know? They used to transport their gear and ammo through the Swamps. There. Now they are looking for new "corridors". And seemingly - through the Gut. I saw them dragging military crates. That's the deal. Alright, take care, I have business. We'll see what profit I get out of this. Marked One, buddy, how are you? Alright. I keep thinking, will I get a bad deal with the skins? You won't get a bad deal! It's a sure thing! Just two tanned skins - it's ridiculous to even bargain. I'm not making anything up, the Duty members are stirring up a whole lot of trouble here! True story. Buddy... How's life? Alright? Well okay then...
I have some information on this matter. Yeah? And what exactly? According to this hunter, the Duty members in the Gut are looking for new supply channels for weapons and ammo. Supposedly, their oxygen was cut off in the Swamps. Is that so? Good news. Now we... \nHmm... Alright. Expecting a reward? I had to run around a lot on these affairs of yours. So how about the payment.
Talk to one of the thugs Find one of Lukash's informants among the thugs and clarify the situation with the missing weapon caravan. There's a guy, ready to leak some info for cash. Need to find him and figure out exactly what is known in the Dark Valley about the caravan that was supposed to deliver additional weapons and ammo to the Duty members. There is an opinion that Borov is involved in this. Will you agree to find this "planted mole"? Boys. The issue with the caravan is postponed for now. Stand down. Boys, regarding the situation with the caravan, circumstances have come to light... Stand down for everyone else for now.
Well? What are you looking at, need something? You're the one I'm looking for. Barkeep is very unhappy that you aren't paying back your debt. He ordered me, if I meet you, to pass on that he's giving you a two-day deadline, otherwise you can buy yourself a wreath with that money. In short, he is very determined, so I advise you, you'd better pay back the debt and quickly. Dammit! Where am I going to find that much for him right now? I was planning to pay it back, but it's not working out yet... Drop it. No need to explain your problems to me. I take it you've already promised and explained enough to Barkeep, since he decided to take drastic measures. Better not waste time, and gather whatever you owe him, especially since the clock is already ticking... Pay back at least most of it, if not all, he'll calm down. Where am I going to find anything so fast? Although... my partner and I have a shared stash - we stashed it for a rainy day. There's a couple of everything there - "Moonlight", "Night Star" and so on, all sorts of minor stuff. Only exactly half of it is mine, and that won't be enough to pay it off, need to take something from my partner's share to pay back at least a large part of the debt. Listen, help me out - go to him, explain everything, and I'll make a run to the stash in the meantime, otherwise I won't make it - that's two places I need to go, and then to Barkeep too - it's not all that fast. Just take his share, you'll explain everything to him later. What's the problem? Your rainy day is already here, why run back and forth. You shady guy... should have paid it back long ago. It's not mine, I'm telling you - only half is mine! I can't do it without asking! Maybe he's also broke right now and relies solely on this stash. You're suggesting I screw over a loyal partner for some trader? I won't be walking the Zone with Barkeep later - he won't cover my back. How do we solve this?.. Or maybe you can help me? I need at least one tier-three artifact, or a couple of tier-twos, I think that'll be enough, and if anything, I'll add a little cash... or you have to go to my partner. Well, holy hell! Find him a partner, give him an artifact... Deal with your own problems yourself! I have to drag myself somewhere else to who knows who? I have what you need, what won't you do out of the kindness of your heart... Only hey... Jot down by your own hand that I gave you an artifact to pay the debt. Give him an artifact... I don't have anything, I'd better run to your partner - it'll be faster, otherwise you'll drag out the time until the limit. You helped me out, thank you... I'm running to the stash - I'll take mine, I think it'll be enough - I'll pay back at least a large part. Here is a receipt from me. You better get moving to Barkeep faster, because time is already pressing. Well, what now? Well, what's up, how are things? I already took what's needed from the stash, just haven't dared to take it to him yet. Here, your partner wrote that you can take it. So, get moving to Barkeep faster, because time is already pressing. And I'll keep this note for myself.
I completed the assignment. Saw your debtor, he'll show up himself soon. Promised to settle up within the next 24 hours. And where are the guarantees? Maybe he promised you the moon or you didn't even see him at all. I do my job honestly and expect others not to screw me over. Here is the note if you don't believe me. Weeeell... you know. Although, alright, I'll take your word for it, we'll consider that you earned yours. And I'll keep this little note for myself just in case this rascal starts dodging again.
Talk to a rookie stalker Find out the meaning of Sidorovich's recent activities through one of the rookies. Lately Sidorovich, the well-known trader from the Cordon, has started showing strange activity in terms of bringing in expensive ammo and large-caliber weapons. As we have learned, officials from the army cordon are involved in this matter, and the tracks lead even higher - to the state leadership. Try to talk about this topic with one of the stalkers who recently came to the Zone. There is an opinion that information about this strange activity of the local trader passed through his relative. Will you take it upon yourself to find this greenhorn? Right. Whoever signed up for the Cordon. The issue is postponed for now. Stand down. Regarding the situation with the Cordon, circumstances have come to light... Stand down for everyone in the loop for now.

Find out more about Ivantsov It is necessary to talk to one of the Duty members about the second-in-command in the Duty faction. Things are not all well in Duty right now. By all appearances, there are some undercurrents in the leadership. And, lately, the surname Ivantsov flashes by more and more often. We don't have any details about him, although we should. Will you take it upon yourself to find out something useful about this man? There is one of them, a Duty member, who has been hanging around in this organization for quite a long time. Perhaps he can shed light on this "dark horse". Will you take it upon yourself to talk to him? Boys. On red two. Stand down. I'm calling about red two. The situation is clearing up. Stand down.
